                    1915
                    1x

                    1916
                    1x

                    1917
                    1x

                    2276

    start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2277
                    1x
                    
                      
    function(.x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2278

                    2281
                    1x

                    2282
                    1x

                    2283
                    1x

                    2284
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2285
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    2286

  assert_any_of(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2287
                    1x
                    
                      
    end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2288
                    1x
                    
                      
    function(.x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2289
                    1x
                    
                      
      assert_datetime(.x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2290
                    !
                    
                      
      assert_no_missing_values(.x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2291
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    2292
                    1x

                    2293
                    1x

                    2294
                    1x
                    
                      
      assert_no_missing_values(.x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2295
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2296
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    2297
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_list(keys)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2298
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_scalar_character(data_base_url)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2299
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_function(.perform)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2300
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_scalar_logical(is_async)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2301
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_scalar_character(adjustment)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2302
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(feed)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2303
                    !
                    
                      
    assert_scalar_character(feed)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2304
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2305
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_scalar_count(limit_per_request)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2306
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_between(limit_per_request, lower = 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2307

  assert_scalar_double(sleep)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2308
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_between(sleep, lower = 0, upper = Inf, upper_inclusive = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2309
                    1x
                    
                      
  return(invisible(NULL))

                    		
                  

                  

                    2310
                    
                    
                      
}

                    2328

  assert_double(value[["vwap"]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    2329
                    1x
                    
                      
  return(value)

}
