            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1856
                    4x
                    
                      
            if (!is.null(ob$a) && length(ob$a) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1857
                    4x
                    
                      
              asks <- data.table::rbindlist(ob$a)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1858
                    4x
                    
                      
              data.table::setnames(asks, c("p", "s"), c("price", "size"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1859
                    4x
                    
                      
              asks[, `:=`(symbol = sym, side = "ask", level = .I, timestamp = ts)]

                    		
                  

                  

                    1860
                    4x
                    
                      
              rows <- c(rows, list(asks))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1861
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1862
                    4x
                    
                      
            if (length(rows) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1863
                    !
                    
                      
              return(data.table::data.table())

                    		
                  

                  

                    1864
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1865
                    4x
                    
                      
            return(data.table::rbindlist(rows, fill = TRUE))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1866
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    1867
                    4x
                    
                      
          dt <- data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1868
                    4x
                    
                      
          if (nrow(dt) > 0 && "symbol" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1869
                    4x
                    
                      
            data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", "side", "level", "price", "size", "timestamp"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1870
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1871
                    4x
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    1872
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1873
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    1874
                    5x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1875
                    5x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1876
                    5x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaMarketData__get_crypto_orderbook,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1877
                    5x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    1878
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1879
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    1880
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    1881
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Screener ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    1882
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    1883
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    1884
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Most Active Stocks

                    		
                  

                  

                    1885
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1886
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the most active stocks by volume or trade count.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1887
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1888
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    1889
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/screener/stocks/most-actives`

                    		
                  

                  

                    1890
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1891
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    1892
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Most Active Stocks](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/mostactives-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1893
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    1894
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1895
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    1896
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1897
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    1898
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/screener/stocks/most-actives?by=volume&top=5'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1899
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1900
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1901
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    1902
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    1903
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1904
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "most_actives": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    1905
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "AAPL", "volume": 82488700, "trade_count": 1036517},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1906
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "TSLA", "volume": 74523100, "trade_count": 987654},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1907
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "NVDA", "volume": 65432100, "trade_count": 876543},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1908
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "AMD", "volume": 54321000, "trade_count": 765432},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1909
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "MSFT", "volume": 22622100, "trade_count": 345678}

                    		
                  

                  

                    1910
                    
                    
                      
    #'   ],

                    		
                  

                  

                    1911
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "last_updated": "2024-01-15T20:00:00Z"

                    		
                  

                  

                    1912
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1913
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1914
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1915
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param by (scalar<character> | NULL) ranking metric: `"volume"` (default)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1916
                    
                    
                      
    #'   or `"trades"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1917
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param top (scalar<count in [1, Inf[> | NULL) number of results to return

                    		
                  

                  

                    1918
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (default 10).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1919
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (MostActives | promise<MostActives>) the most active stocks.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1920
                    
                    
                      
    #'   Columns: `symbol` (character); `volume`, `trade_count` (count — the

                    		
                  

                  

                    1921
                    
                    
                      
    #'   parser coerces both whole-number counters to a `numeric` double so a

                    		
                  

                  

                    1922
                    
                    
                      
    #'   large volume cannot overflow `integer`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1923
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1924
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    1925
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    1926
                    
                    
                      
    #' market <- AlpacaMarketData$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    1927
                    
                    
                      
    #' actives <- market$get_most_actives(by = "volume", top = 20)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1928
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(actives)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1929
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1930
                    
                    
                      
    get_most_actives = function(by = NULL, top = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1931
                    2x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaMarketData__get_most_actives(by, top)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1932
                    2x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1933
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/screener/stocks/most-actives",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1934
                    2x
                    
                      
        query = list(by = by, top = top),

                    		
                  

                  

                    1935
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1936
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (is.null(data$most_actives) || length(data$most_actives) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1937
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_most_actives())

                    		
                  

                  

                    1938
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1939
                    2x
                    
                      
          dt <- as_dt_list(data$most_actives)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1940
                    
                    
                      
          # `volume` / `trade_count` are whole-number counters; coerce both to a

                    		
                  

                  

                    1941
                    
                    
                      
          # clean `numeric` double so a large volume cannot overflow `integer`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1942
                    2x
                    
                      
          coerce_cols(dt, c("volume", "trade_count"), as.numeric)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1943
                    2x
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    1944
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1945
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    1946
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1947
                    2x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1948
                    2x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaMarketData__get_most_actives,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1949
                    2x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    1950
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1951
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    1952
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    1953
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    1954
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Top Market Movers

                    		
                  

                  

                    1955
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1956
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the top market movers (gainers and losers) by percentage change.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1957
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1958
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    1959
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/screener/{market_type}/movers`

                    		
                  

                  

                    1960
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1961
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    1962
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Top Market Movers](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/movers-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1963
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    1964
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1965
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    1966
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1967
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    1968
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/screener/stocks/movers?top=3'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1969
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1970
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1971
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    1972
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    1973
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1974
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "gainers": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    1975
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "SMCI", "percent_change": 8.52, "change": 6.45, "price": 82.15},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1976
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "PLTR", "percent_change": 5.31, "change": 1.23, "price": 24.40},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1977
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "RIVN", "percent_change": 4.87, "change": 0.82, "price": 17.67}

                    		
                  

                  

                    1978
                    
                    
                      
    #'   ],

                    		
                  

                  

                    1979
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "losers": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    1980
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "MRNA", "percent_change": -6.12, "change": -6.80, "price": 104.30},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1981
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "ENPH", "percent_change": -5.45, "change": -6.10, "price": 105.80},

                    		
                  

                  

                    1982
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {"symbol": "COIN", "percent_change": -4.98, "change": -7.50, "price": 143.10}

                    		
                  

                  

                    1983
                    
                    
                      
    #'   ],

                    		
                  

                  

                    1984
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "market_type": "stocks",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1985
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "last_updated": "2024-01-15T20:00:00Z"

                    		
                  

                  

                    1986
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1987
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1988
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1989
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param market_type (scalar<character>) `"stocks"` (default) or `"crypto"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1990
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param top (scalar<count in [1, Inf[> | NULL) number of results per

                    		
                  

                  

                    1991
                    
                    
                      
    #'   direction (default 10).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1992
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (Movers | promise<Movers>) the movers. Columns: `symbol`

                    		
                  

                  

                    1993
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (character); `percent_change`, `change`, `price` (numeric); plus a

                    		
                  

                  

                    1994
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `direction` column (`"gainer"` / `"loser"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1995
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1996
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    1997
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    1998
                    
                    
                      
    #' market <- AlpacaMarketData$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    1999
                    
                    
                      
    #' movers <- market$get_movers(top = 5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2000
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(movers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2001
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2002
                    
                    
                      
    get_movers = function(market_type = "stocks", top = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2003
                    2x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaMarketData__get_movers(market_type, top)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2004
                    2x
                    
                      
      endpoint <- paste0("/v1beta1/screener/", market_type, "/movers")

                    		
                  

                  

                    2005
                    2x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2006
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2007
                    2x
                    
                      
        query = list(top = top),

                    		
                  

                  

                    2008
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2009
                    2x
                    
                      
          gainers <- data$gainers

                    		
                  

                  

                    2010
                    2x
                    
                      
          losers <- data$losers

                    		
                  

                  

                    2011
                    2x
                    
                      
          dts <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    2012
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (!is.null(gainers) && length(gainers) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2013
                    2x
                    
                      
            g <- as_dt_list(gainers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2014
                    2x
                    
                      
            if (nrow(g) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2015
                    2x
                    
                      
              g[, direction := "gainer"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    2016
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2017
                    2x
                    
                      
            dts <- c(dts, list(g))

                    		
                  

                  

                    2018
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2019
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (!is.null(losers) && length(losers) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2020
                    2x
                    
                      
            l <- as_dt_list(losers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2021
                    2x
                    
                      
            if (nrow(l) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2022
                    2x
                    
                      
              l[, direction := "loser"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    2023
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2024
                    2x
                    
                      
            dts <- c(dts, list(l))

                    		
                  

                  

                    2025
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2026
                    2x
                    
                      
          if (length(dts) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2027
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_movers())

                    		
                  

                  

                    2028
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2029
                    2x
                    
                      
          return(data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    2030
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2031
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    2032
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2033
                    2x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2034
                    2x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaMarketData__get_movers,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2035
                    2x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    2036
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    2037
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2038
                    
                    
                      
  ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    2039
                    
                    
                      
  private = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2040
                    
                    
                      
    .data_base_url = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2041
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    2042
                    
                    
                      
    # Execute a Market Data API request (uses data base URL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2043
                    
                    
                      
    .data_request = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2044
                    
                    
                      
      endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2045
                    
                    
                      
      query = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    2046
                    
                    
                      
      .parser = identity,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2047
                    
                    
                      
      timeout = 30

                    		
                  

                  

                    2048
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2049
                    27x
                    
                      
      return(alpaca_build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    2050
                    27x
                    
                      
        base_url = private$.data_base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2051
                    27x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2052
                    27x
                    
                      
        method = "GET",

                    		
                  

                  

                    2053
                    27x
                    
                      
        query = query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2054
                    27x
                    
                      
        keys = private$.keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2055
                    27x
                    
                      
        .perform = private$.perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2056
                    27x
                    
                      
        .parser = .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2057
                    27x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    2058
                    27x
                    
                      
        timeout = timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    2059
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    2060
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    2061
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    2062
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/AlpacaAccount.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# R6 class for Alpaca account, positions, and portfolio management.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' AlpacaAccount: Account, Positions, and Portfolio

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Provides methods for retrieving account information, managing positions,

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' viewing portfolio history, and querying account activities on Alpaca's

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' Trading API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' Inherits from [AlpacaBase]. All methods support both synchronous and

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' asynchronous execution depending on the `async` parameter at construction.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Purpose and Scope

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Account**: Retrieve current account details (equity, buying power, etc.).

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Positions**: View all open positions or a specific position by symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Close Positions**: Close individual positions (fully or partially).

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Options Exercise**: Exercise options positions.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Account Config**: View and update account configurations.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Portfolio History**: View historical portfolio value snapshots.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Activities**: Query account activity history (fills, dividends, etc.).

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Watchlists**: Create, update, and manage symbol watchlists.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Account](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getaccount-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Positions](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getallopenpositions)

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Portfolio History](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getaccountportfoliohistory-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Account Activities](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getaccountactivities-2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Endpoints Covered

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' | Method | Endpoint | HTTP |

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' |--------|----------|------|

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_account | `GET /v2/account` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_positions | `GET /v2/positions` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_position | `GET /v2/positions/\{symbol_or_id\}` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' | close_position | `DELETE /v2/positions/\{symbol_or_id\}` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' | close_all_positions | `DELETE /v2/positions` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_account_config | `GET /v2/account/configurations` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' | modify_account_config | `PATCH /v2/account/configurations` | PATCH |

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' | exercise_option | `POST /v2/positions/\{symbol_or_id\}/exercise` | POST |

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_portfolio_history | `GET /v2/account/portfolio/history` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_activities | `GET /v2/account/activities` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_activities_by_type | `GET /v2/account/activities/\{type\}` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_watchlists | `GET /v2/watchlists` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_watchlist | `GET /v2/watchlists/\{id\}` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' | add_watchlist | `POST /v2/watchlists` | POST |

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' | modify_watchlist | `PUT /v2/watchlists/\{id\}` | PUT |

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' | add_watchlist_symbol | `POST /v2/watchlists/\{id\}` | POST |

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_watchlist_symbol | `DELETE /v2/watchlists/\{id\}/\{symbol\}` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_watchlist | `DELETE /v2/watchlists/\{id\}` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' acct <- AlpacaAccount$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' # Account details

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' info <- acct$get_account()

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' print(info[, .(status, equity, buying_power, cash)])

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' # Open positions

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' positions <- acct$get_positions()

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' print(positions)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom R6 R6Class

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
AlpacaAccount <- R6::R6Class(

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  "AlpacaAccount",

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  inherit = AlpacaBase,

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
  public = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Account ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Account Information

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the current account details including equity, buying power,

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
    #' cash, margin, and account status.

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/account`

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Get Account](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getaccount-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/account'

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "e6fe16f3-64a4-4921-8928-cadf02f92f98",

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "account_number": "PA1234567",

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "ACTIVE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "currency": "USD",

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "cash": "100000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "portfolio_value": "100000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "equity": "100000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "last_equity": "100000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "buying_power": "400000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "initial_margin": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "maintenance_margin": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "long_market_value": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "short_market_value": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "pattern_day_trader": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trading_blocked": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "transfers_blocked": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "account_blocked": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "daytrade_count": 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "daytrading_buying_power": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "regt_buying_power": "200000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "multiplier": "4",

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "sma": "0",

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (Account | promise<Account>) the account details. Columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    #'   include `id`, `account_number`, `status`, `currency`, `cash`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `portfolio_value`, `equity`, `buying_power`, `initial_margin`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `maintenance_margin`, `long_market_value`, `short_market_value`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `daytrading_buying_power` (all character); `pattern_day_trader` and

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `trading_blocked` (logical); `daytrade_count` (integer); and

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `created_at` (POSIXct, UTC).

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    #' acct <- AlpacaAccount$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
    #' info <- acct$get_account()

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    #' cat("Equity:", info$equity, "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
    #' cat("Buying power:", info$buying_power, "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
    get_account = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    2x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/account",

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = parse_account

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    2x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    2x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaAccount__get_account,

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    2x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Account Configurations

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the current account configuration settings including DTBP

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    #' check behaviour, trade confirmation emails, and shorting restrictions.

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/account/configurations`

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Get Account Configurations](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/getaccountconfig-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/account/configurations'

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "dtbp_check": "both",

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "no_shorting": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "suspend_trade": false,

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trade_confirm_email": "all",

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "fractional_trading": true,

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "max_margin_multiplier": "4",

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "pdt_check": "entry"

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (AccountConfig | promise<AccountConfig>) the configuration. Columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    #'   include `dtbp_check`, `trade_confirm_email`, `max_margin_multiplier`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `pdt_check` (character); and `no_shorting`, `suspend_trade`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `fractional_trading` (logical).

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
    #' acct <- AlpacaAccount$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
    #' config <- acct$get_account_config()

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(config)

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    get_account_config = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    2x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/account/configurations",

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = as_dt_row

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    2x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    2x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaAccount__get_account_config,

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    2x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
    #' Update Account Configurations

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
    #' Modifies one or more account configuration settings.

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
    #' `PATCH https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/account/configurations`

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
    #' [Update Account Configurations](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/patchaccountconfig-1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
