                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/backfill.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Bulk bar data download with CSV-based resume.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Backfill Historical Bar Data

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Downloads historical OHLCV bar data for one or more symbols and timeframes,

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' saving results to a CSV file. Supports resuming interrupted downloads by

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' reading existing data and skipping completed symbol-timeframe combinations.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param symbols (character) ticker symbols (e.g., `c("AAPL", "MSFT")`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param timeframes (character) bar timeframes (e.g., `c("1Day", "1Hour")`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   See `alpaca_timeframe_map` for valid values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param from (POSIXct | character) start date/time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param to (POSIXct | character) end date/time. Defaults to the current UTC

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   time ([lubridate::now()]).

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param path (scalar<character>) file path for CSV output. Default

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"alpaca_bars.csv"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @param adjustment (scalar<character>) price adjustment type. Default `"raw"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) data feed (`"iex"` or `"sip"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sleep (scalar<numeric in [0, Inf[>) seconds to pause between requests

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   (rate limiting). Default `0.25`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys (list) API credentials. Defaults to [get_api_keys()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data_base_url (scalar<character>) market data base URL. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   [get_data_base_url()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (class<data.table>) all downloaded data (invisibly). Also writes to

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   CSV.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   Per-combo failures are surfaced as warnings during the run (one

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'   `rlang::warn()` per failed `(symbol, timeframe)` pair, with the

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   underlying error message). After the loop, if any combinations

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   failed, a final summary warning lists the count and the affected

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   pairs. No failure data is hidden on the return value.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' # Download daily bars for AAPL and MSFT

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' dt <- alpaca_backfill_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   symbols = c("AAPL", "MSFT"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   timeframes = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   from = "2020-01-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   path = "data/bars.csv"

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' # Resume an interrupted download

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' dt <- alpaca_backfill_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'   symbols = c("AAPL", "MSFT", "TSLA"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   timeframes = c("1Day", "1Hour"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   from = "2020-01-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'   path = "data/bars.csv"

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_backfill_bars <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  timeframes = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
  from,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  to = lubridate::now(tzone = "UTC"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  path = "alpaca_bars.csv",

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
  adjustment = "raw",

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
  feed = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
  sleep = 0.25,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
  keys = get_api_keys(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  data_base_url = get_data_base_url()

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    1x
                    
                      
  assert_args_alpaca_backfill_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    1x
                    
                      
    symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    1x
                    
                      
    timeframes,

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
    from,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
    to,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
    path,

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    1x
                    
                      
    adjustment,

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    1x
                    
                      
    feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    1x
                    
                      
    sleep,

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    1x
                    
                      
    keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    1x
                    
                      
    data_base_url

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (is.character(from)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    1x
                    
                      
    from <- lubridate::as_datetime(from, tz = "UTC")

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (is.character(to)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    1x
                    
                      
    to <- lubridate::as_datetime(to, tz = "UTC")

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
  # Read existing CSV for resume support

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    1x
                    
                      
  existing <- data.table::data.table()

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    1x
                    
                      
  completed <- character()

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (file.exists(path)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    !
                    
                      
    existing <- data.table::fread(path)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
    if (nrow(existing) > 0 && all(c("symbol", "timeframe") %in% names(existing))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    !
                    
                      
      completed <- unique(paste(existing$symbol, existing$timeframe, sep = "|"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
    message(sprintf("Resuming: %d existing rows, %d combos already done.", nrow(existing), length(completed)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
  # Build task grid

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    1x
                    
                      
  tasks <- expand.grid(symbol = symbols, timeframe = timeframes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    1x
                    
                      
  tasks$key <- paste(tasks$symbol, tasks$timeframe, sep = "|")

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    1x
                    
                      
  tasks <- tasks[!tasks$key %in% completed, , drop = FALSE]

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(tasks) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
    message("All symbol-timeframe combinations already downloaded.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
    return(invisible(assert_return_alpaca_backfill_bars(existing)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    1x
                    
                      
  message(sprintf("Downloading %d symbol-timeframe combination(s)...\n", nrow(tasks)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    1x
                    
                      
  results <- list(existing)

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    1x
                    
                      
  failures <- character()

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    1x
                    
                      
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(tasks))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    1x
                    
                      
    sym <- tasks$symbol[i]

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    1x
                    
                      
    tf <- tasks$timeframe[i]

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    1x
                    
                      
    message(sprintf("  [%d/%d] %s %s", i, nrow(tasks), sym, tf))

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    1x
                    
                      
    dt <- tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
      {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    1x
                    
                      
        alpaca_fetch_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    1x
                    
                      
          symbol = sym,

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    1x
                    
                      
          timeframe = tf,

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    1x
                    
                      
          start = from,

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    1x
                    
                      
          end = to,

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    1x
                    
                      
          keys = keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    1x
                    
                      
          data_base_url = data_base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    1x
                    
                      
          adjustment = adjustment,

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    1x
                    
                      
          feed = feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    1x
                    
                      
          sleep = sleep

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
      },

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    1x
                    
                      
      error = function(e) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    1x
                    
                      
        rlang::warn(sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    1x
                    
                      
          "[%d/%d] %s %s: FAILED - %s",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    1x
                    
                      
          i,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    1x
                    
                      
          nrow(tasks),

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    1x
                    
                      
          sym,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    1x
                    
                      
          tf,

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    1x
                    
                      
          conditionMessage(e)

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
        ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    1x
                    
                      
        return(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    1x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(dt) && nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
      dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
      dt[, timeframe := tf]

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    !
                    
                      
      results <- c(results, list(dt))

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
      message(sprintf("    %d bars", nrow(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    1x
                    
                      
    } else if (is.null(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    1x
                    
                      
      failures <- c(failures, paste(sym, tf, sep = "|"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    !
                    
                      
      message("    0 bars (no data in range)")

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    1x
                    
                      
    if (i < nrow(tasks) && sleep > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
      Sys.sleep(sleep)

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    1x
                    
                      
  combined <- data.table::rbindlist(results, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
  # Deduplicate

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(combined) > 0 && "datetime" %in% names(combined)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
    combined <- unique(combined, by = c("symbol", "timeframe", "datetime"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    !
                    
                      
    data.table::setorder(combined, symbol, timeframe, datetime)

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
  # Write CSV

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    1x
                    
                      
  data.table::fwrite(combined, path)

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    1x
                    
                      
  message(sprintf("\nDone. %d total rows written to %s", nrow(combined), path))

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
  # Final summary warning if anything failed. Per-combo warnings already

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
  # fired inside the tryCatch above; this gives a single line the user

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
  # can't miss if the verbose per-combo output scrolled past.

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (length(failures) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    1x
                    
                      
    rlang::warn(sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    1x
                    
                      
      "alpaca_backfill_bars: %d of %d (symbol, timeframe) combinations failed: %s",

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    1x
                    
                      
      length(failures),

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    1x
                    
                      
      nrow(tasks),

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    1x
                    
                      
      paste(failures, collapse = ", ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    1x
                    
                      
  return(invisible(assert_return_alpaca_backfill_bars(combined)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/helpers_parse.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Alpaca-specific response parsing and data.table construction helpers. The

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
# generic toolkit (to_snake_case, as_dt_row, as_dt_list,

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
# collapse_string_array_fields) is imported from connectcore (see imports.R);

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
# this file holds the Alpaca-specific time coercions and the per-endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
# parsers built on top of both.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' Wrap Multi-Element List Fields

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' Wraps any field that is a list with length >= 1 inside another list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' so that `rbindlist()` treats it as a single list-column entry rather

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' than expanding it into multiple rows.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (list) a named list (single record).

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (list) the same list with multi-element list fields wrapped.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
wrap_list_fields <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    6x
                    
                      
  assert_args_wrap_list_fields(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    6x
                    
                      
  for (nm in names(x)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    12x
                    
                      
    val <- x[[nm]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    12x
                    
                      
    if (is.list(val) && length(val) >= 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    6x
                    
                      
      x[[nm]] <- list(val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    6x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_wrap_list_fields(x))

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
# Date / time conversion helpers

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
# All RFC-3339 / `YYYY-MM-DD` parsing across the package funnels through

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
# these small helpers so the behaviour is consistent and there's a single

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
# chokepoint if we ever need to swap the underlying parser.

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#   rfc3339_to_datetime(x)         scalar/vector  ->  POSIXct (UTC)

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#   parse_timestamp_cols(dt, cols) data.table     ->  POSIXct in-place

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#   parse_date_cols(dt, cols)      data.table     ->  Date in-place

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#   combine_et_datetime(date, t)   date + HH:MM   ->  POSIXct (America/New_York)

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#   hhmm_to_hh_mm(x)               "HHMM"         ->  "HH:MM"

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
# When to use which:

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#   * Single value or ad-hoc one-off  -> rfc3339_to_datetime()

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#   * Column(s) on a data.table       -> parse_timestamp_cols / parse_date_cols

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#   * Naive market times (calendar)   -> combine_et_datetime + hhmm_to_hh_mm

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
# Why rfc3339_to_datetime() exists vs. calling lubridate::as_datetime

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
# directly: it short-circuits NULL and all-NA input to NA_POSIXct_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
# avoiding lubridate's length-0 / warning behaviour on those inputs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse an RFC-3339 Timestamp to POSIXct

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' Thin wrapper around [lubridate::as_datetime()] with NULL / all-NA

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' input short-circuited to `NA_POSIXct_`. Prefer this over calling

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' `lubridate::as_datetime()` directly so the package has one chokepoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' for instant parsing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (character | NA | NULL) RFC-3339 timestamp string(s) (e.g.,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"2024-01-15T14:30:00Z"`), or `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (POSIXct | NA) the parsed UTC date-times, or `NA` if `x` is `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom lubridate as_datetime

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
rfc3339_to_datetime <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    288x
                    
                      
  assert_args_rfc3339_to_datetime(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    288x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(x)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_rfc3339_to_datetime(lubridate::NA_POSIXct_))

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
  # Don't short-circuit on `all(is.na(x))` — returning the length-1

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  # `NA_POSIXct_` from there would, when fed back through

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  # `coerce_cols()` -> `data.table::set()`, get recycled into the

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  # existing column's type rather than replacing the column with a

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
  # POSIXct one. The helper must return a vector the same length as

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
  # `x` so the column lands as POSIXct regardless of whether every

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
  # value is NA. `lubridate::as_datetime()` does the right thing on

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  # all-NA input on its own. Mirrors the binance fix in

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
  # `ms_to_datetime`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    287x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_rfc3339_to_datetime(lubridate::as_datetime(x)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#' Apply a Function to Selected Columns of a data.table by Reference

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#' Walks `cols`; for each that exists in `dt`, replaces it in place with the

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' result of `fn(dt[[col]])`. Columns that are not in `dt` are silently

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#' skipped — useful for endpoints whose payload sometimes omits optional

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#' fields. A zero-row `dt` short-circuits, so the caller can pipe through

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#' this without a separate `nrow(dt) > 0` guard.

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#' Replaces the repeated boilerplate of:

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#' if (nrow(dt) > 0 && "created_at" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'   dt[, created_at := rfc3339_to_datetime(created_at)]

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' with:

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#' coerce_cols(dt, "created_at", rfc3339_to_datetime)

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' Modifies `dt` by reference via `data.table::set()`; returns `dt`

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#' invisibly so the call can be the last line of a parser. Converter-

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' agnostic — pass any `fn(vec) -> vec` function. Mirrors the same-named

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' helper in the binance package.

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dt (class<data.table>) the table to mutate (by reference).

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#' @param cols (character) candidate column names to convert.

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#' @param fn (function) takes a column vector, returns the coerced vector.

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (class<data.table>) `dt`, modified by reference and returned

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#'   invisibly.

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
coerce_cols <- function(dt, cols, fn) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    303x
                    
                      
  assert_args_coerce_cols(dt, cols, fn)

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    303x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(dt) == 0L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    3x
                    
                      
    return(invisible(assert_return_coerce_cols(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
  # `unique()` prevents double-coercion when a caller passes the same

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
  # column name twice (e.g. `coerce_cols(dt, c("created_at",

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
  # "created_at"), rfc3339_to_datetime)` would otherwise re-feed the

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
  # already-converted POSIXct vector back through

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
  # `lubridate::as_datetime`, silently producing wildly wrong values

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
  # — POSIXct numerics reinterpreted as RFC-3339 strings parse to

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  # year-56,000+ timestamps with no warning). Mirrors the kucoin and

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
  # binance fixes.

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    300x
                    
                      
  for (col in unique(cols)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    871x
                    
                      
    if (col %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    805x
                    
                      
      v <- dt[[col]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
      # A JSON `null` field arrives as an all-NA *logical* column, because

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
      # `as_dt_row()` maps `NULL` -> `NA`. The coercion functions

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
      # (`rfc3339_to_datetime`, `lubridate::ymd`, `as.numeric`) expect a

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
      # character/atomic input and a `logical` would error (e.g. an unfilled

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
      # order's `filled_at: null`). Normalise such a column to `NA_character_`

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
      # of the same length first; `fn` then yields a correctly typed all-NA

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
      # column (NA POSIXct / NA Date / NA real).

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    805x
                    
                      
      if (is.logical(v) && all(is.na(v))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    108x
                    
                      
        v <- rep(NA_character_, length(v))

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    805x
                    
                      
      data.table::set(dt, j = col, value = fn(v))

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    300x
                    
                      
  return(invisible(assert_return_coerce_cols(dt)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
#' Convert Named Character Columns of a data.table to POSIXct

#' Walks the given column names; for each that exists in `dt`, replaces

                    		
                  

                  

                    155

                    156

                    157

                    163

                    164
                    
                    
                      
#' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
parse_timestamp_cols <- function(dt, cols) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    107x
                    
                      
  return(coerce_cols(dt, cols, rfc3339_to_datetime))

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    172

                    176

                    177

                    178
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dt (class<data.table>) the table to mutate (by reference).

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
#' @param cols (character) candidate column names to convert.

                    		
                  

                  

                    181

                    182

                    183

                    184
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
parse_date_cols <- function(dt, cols) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    22x
                    
                      
  return(coerce_cols(dt, cols, function(x) lubridate::ymd(x, quiet = TRUE)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    189

                    190
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
# Exchange timezone used by Alpaca for naive market times (open/close,

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
# session_open/session_close on /v2/calendar). Alpaca does NOT

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
# explicitly document the timezone of these fields on the calendar /

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
# clock reference pages — the inference is:

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
#   1. /v2 is US-only (NYSE/NASDAQ-equivalent venues).

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
#   2. The market-data FAQ confirms NY tz is canonical for bar

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
#      aggregation.

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
#   3. `09:30` and `16:00` only make sense as ET wall-clock times.

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
#   4. Every Alpaca SDK in other languages treats it as ET.

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
# The named tz handles DST transitions automatically (a fixed `-05:00`

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
# would be wrong half the year).

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
# TODO(v3): Alpaca's `/v3/calendar` exposes multiple markets and will

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
# need per-market timezone lookup rather than this single constant.

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
ALPACA_EXCHANGE_TZ <- "America/New_York"

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
#' Combine a YYYY-MM-DD Date String with a HH:MM Time String

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
#' @param date (character | NA) ISO date string(s).

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time (character | NA) `"HH:MM"` clock time(s).

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (POSIXct | NA) the combined date-times in `America/New_York`, `NA`

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
#'   where inputs are `NA`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
combine_et_datetime <- function(date, time) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    5x
                    
                      
  assert_args_combine_et_datetime(date, time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    5x
                    
                      
  joined <- ifelse(is.na(date) | is.na(time), NA_character_, paste(date, time))

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    5x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_combine_et_datetime(lubridate::ymd_hm(joined, tz = ALPACA_EXCHANGE_TZ, quiet = TRUE)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
#' Insert a Colon into a HHMM Time String

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca's `session_open`/`session_close` fields are encoded as `"HHMM"`

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
