                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/AlpacaOptions.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# R6 class for Alpaca options data and trading.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' AlpacaOptions: Options Contracts and Data

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Provides methods for querying options contracts, retrieving options

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' market data (bars, trades, quotes, snapshots), and placing options orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' on Alpaca's API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' Inherits from [AlpacaBase]. All methods support both synchronous and

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' asynchronous execution depending on the `async` parameter at construction.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Purpose and Scope

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Contracts**: Search and filter available options contracts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Market Data**: Retrieve historical and latest options market data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Snapshots**: Get real-time snapshots of options contracts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Options Chain**: Retrieve the full options chain for an underlying.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Base URLs

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' Options market data endpoints use `https://data.alpaca.markets`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' Contract metadata endpoints use the trading base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Options Contracts](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/get-options-contracts)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' - [Options Market Data](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/docs/historical-option-data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Endpoints Covered

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' | Method | Endpoint | Base |

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' |--------|----------|------|

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_contracts | `GET /v2/options/contracts` | trading |

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_contract | `GET /v2/options/contracts/\{symbol_or_id\}` | trading |

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_bars | `GET /v1beta1/options/bars` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_trades | `GET /v1beta1/options/trades` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_latest_quotes | `GET /v1beta1/options/quotes/latest` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_snapshots | `GET /v1beta1/options/snapshots` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_snapshot | `GET /v1beta1/options/snapshots/\{symbol\}` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_latest_trades | `GET /v1beta1/options/trades/latest` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_option_chain | `GET /v1beta1/options/snapshots/\{underlying_symbol\}` | data |

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' # Search for AAPL call options

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' contracts <- opts$get_contracts(

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'   underlying_symbols = "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   type = "call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   expiration_date_gte = "2024-06-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'   limit = 10

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' print(contracts[, .(symbol, type, strike_price, expiration_date)])

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom R6 R6Class

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
AlpacaOptions <- R6::R6Class(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
  "AlpacaOptions",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  inherit = AlpacaBase,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  public = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
    #' Initialise an AlpacaOptions Object

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
    #' Creates a new AlpacaOptions instance for querying options contracts,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
    #' market data, and options chain information.

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
    #' Constructor only — no HTTP request is made.

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Options Trading Overview](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/docs/options-trading)

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
    #' # No HTTP request — this is a constructor. Verify credentials with:

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/options/contracts?limit=1'

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
    #' # N/A — constructor does not make an HTTP request.

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param keys (list) API credentials from [get_api_keys()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param base_url (scalar<character>) trading API base URL. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `get_base_url()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param data_base_url (scalar<character>) market data API base URL. Defaults

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
    #'   to `get_data_base_url()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param async (scalar<logical>) if `TRUE`, methods return promises. Default

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `FALSE`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (class<AlpacaOptions>) invisibly, self.

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    initialize = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
      keys = get_api_keys(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
      base_url = get_base_url(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
      data_base_url = get_data_base_url(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
      async = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    14x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__initialize(keys, base_url, data_base_url, async)

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    14x
                    
                      
      super$initialize(keys = keys, base_url = base_url, async = async)

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    14x
                    
                      
      private$.data_base_url <- data_base_url

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    14x
                    
                      
      return(invisible(assert_return_AlpacaOptions__initialize(self)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Contracts ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Options Contracts

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
    #' Searches for available options contracts with filtering by underlying

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
    #' symbol, type, expiration date, strike price, and more.

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/options/contracts`

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Get Options Contracts](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/get-options-contracts)

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/options/contracts?underlying_symbols=AAPL&type=call&limit=5'

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "option_contracts": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    #'     {

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "id": "uuid",

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "symbol": "AAPL240621C00200000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "name": "AAPL Jun 21 2024 200.00 Call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "status": "active",

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "tradable": true,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "type": "call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "strike_price": "200.00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "expiration_date": "2024-06-21",

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "underlying_symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "underlying_asset_id": "uuid",

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "style": "american",

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "root_symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "size": "100",

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "open_interest": "1234",

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "close_price": "5.50"

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    #'     }

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
    #'   ],

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "next_page_token": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param underlying_symbols (scalar<character> | NULL) comma-separated

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
    #'   underlying symbols to filter (e.g., `"AAPL"` or `"AAPL,MSFT"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param status (scalar<character> | NULL) contract status (`"active"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"inactive"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param type (scalar<character> | NULL) option type (`"call"`, `"put"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date (scalar<character> | NULL) exact expiration date

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (`"YYYY-MM-DD"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date_gte (scalar<character> | NULL) expiration on or

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    #'   after this date.

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date_lte (scalar<character> | NULL) expiration on or

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
    #'   before this date.

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param strike_price_gte (scalar<numeric> | NULL) minimum strike price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param strike_price_lte (scalar<numeric> | NULL) maximum strike price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param root_symbol (scalar<character> | NULL) options root symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param style (scalar<character> | NULL) option style (`"american"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"european"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit (scalar<count in [1, 10001[> | NULL) max contracts to return

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (default 100, max 10000).

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param page_token (scalar<character> | NULL) cursor for pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param show_deliverables (scalar<logical> | NULL) if `TRUE`, include the

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverables` array in the response.

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param ppind (scalar<logical> | NULL) filter by Penny Program Indicator.

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `TRUE` returns only contracts eligible for penny price increments.

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (Contract | promise<Contract>) the contracts. With

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `show_deliverables = NULL` (default) or `FALSE`, returns one row per

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
    #'   contract. With `show_deliverables = TRUE`, the nested `deliverables`

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
    #'   array is exploded to one row per `(contract, deliverable)`; contract

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
    #'   fields are replicated on each row, deliverable fields appear as

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverable_*` columns, and a 1-indexed `deliverable_index` is added.

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
    #'   Filter to canonical per-contract rows with

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `dt[deliverable_index == 1L | is.na(deliverable_index)]`. Contract

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
    #'   columns: `id`, `symbol`, `name`, `status`, `type`, `strike_price`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `underlying_symbol`, `style`, `root_symbol`, `size`, `open_interest`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `close_price` (character); `tradable` (logical); `expiration_date`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `open_interest_date`, `close_price_date` (Date). Deliverable columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (only when `show_deliverables = TRUE`): `deliverable_index`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverable_type`, `deliverable_symbol`, `deliverable_asset_id`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverable_amount`, `deliverable_allocation_percentage`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverable_settlement_type`, `deliverable_settlement_method`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `deliverable_delayed_settlement`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
    #' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
    #' # Find AAPL calls expiring after June 2024

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
    #' contracts <- opts$get_contracts(

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
    #'   underlying_symbols = "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
    #'   type = "call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
    #'   expiration_date_gte = "2024-06-01",

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
    #'   limit = 10

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
    #' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(contracts)

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
    get_contracts = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
      underlying_symbols = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
      status = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
      type = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date_gte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date_lte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
      strike_price_gte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
      strike_price_lte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
      root_symbol = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
      style = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
      page_token = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
      show_deliverables = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
      ppind = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    4x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_contracts(

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    4x
                    
                      
        underlying_symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    4x
                    
                      
        status,

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    4x
                    
                      
        type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    4x
                    
                      
        strike_price_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    4x
                    
                      
        strike_price_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    4x
                    
                      
        root_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    4x
                    
                      
        style,

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    4x
                    
                      
        limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    4x
                    
                      
        page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    4x
                    
                      
        show_deliverables,

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    4x
                    
                      
        ppind

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    4x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_gte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_gte <- as.character(strike_price_gte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    4x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_lte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_lte <- as.character(strike_price_lte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    4x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    4x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v2/options/contracts",

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    4x
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    4x
                    
                      
          underlying_symbols = underlying_symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    4x
                    
                      
          status = status,

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    4x
                    
                      
          type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date = expiration_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_gte = expiration_date_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_lte = expiration_date_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    4x
                    
                      
          strike_price_gte = strike_price_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    4x
                    
                      
          strike_price_lte = strike_price_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    4x
                    
                      
          root_symbol = root_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    4x
                    
                      
          style = style,

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    4x
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    4x
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    4x
                    
                      
          show_deliverables = show_deliverables,

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    4x
                    
                      
          ppind = ppind

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    4x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    4x
                    
                      
          return(parse_contracts(data$option_contracts))

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    4x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    4x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    4x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_contracts,

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    4x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async
