    # nolint start: line_length_linter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Option Contract by Symbol or ID

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves a single options contract by its OCC symbol or UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/options/contracts/{symbol_or_id}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Get Option Contract by ID or Symbol](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/get-option-contract-symbol_or_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/options/contracts/AAPL250620C00200000'

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "symbol": "AAPL250620C00200000",

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "name": "AAPL Jun 20 2025 200.00 Call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "status": "active",

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "tradable": true,

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "type": "call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "strike_price": "200",

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "expiration_date": "2025-06-20",

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "underlying_symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "underlying_asset_id": "b28f4066-5c6d-479b-a2af-85dc1a8f02fd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "style": "american",

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "root_symbol": "AAPL",

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "size": "100",

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "open_interest": "8523",

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "open_interest_date": "2025-03-07",

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "close_price": "12.35",

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "close_price_date": "2025-03-07"

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbol_or_id (scalar<character>) OCC option symbol or contract UUID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (Contract | promise<Contract>) the contract, with the same

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    
                    
                      
    #'   columns as `get_contracts()`, single row.

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      
    #' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    
                    
                      
    #' contract <- opts$get_contract("AAPL240621C00200000")

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(contract)

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    
                    
                      
    get_contract = function(symbol_or_id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    1x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_contract(symbol_or_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    1x
                    
                      
      assert::assert_nonempty_strings(symbol_or_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    1x
                    
                      
      endpoint <- paste0("/v2/options/contracts/", symbol_or_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    1x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    1x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    1x
                    
                      
        .parser = parse_contract

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    1x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    1x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_contract,

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    1x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    
                    
                      
    # nolint end

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Options Market Data ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    
                    
                      
    # nolint start: line_length_linter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Options Bars (OHLCV)

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves historical bar data for options contracts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/bars`

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Options Bars](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optionbars)

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/bars?symbols=AAPL250620C00200000&timeframe=1Day&start=2025-03-01&limit=5'

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "bars": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620C00200000": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    
                    
                      
    #'       {

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-03T05:00:00Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "o": 11.80,

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "h": 13.25,

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "l": 11.50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": 12.90,

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "v": 4523,

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "n": 312,

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vw": 12.45

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    
                    
                      
    #'       {

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-04T05:00:00Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "o": 12.90,

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "h": 14.10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "l": 12.60,

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": 13.75,

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "v": 5891,

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "n": 428,

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vw": 13.30

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    
                    
                      
    #'     ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    
                    
                      
    #'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "next_page_token": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols (scalar<character>) comma-separated OCC option symbols.

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param timeframe (scalar<character>) bar timeframe (e.g., `"1Day"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"1Hour"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param start (scalar<character> | NULL) start date/time (RFC-3339 or

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"YYYY-MM-DD"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param end (scalar<character> | NULL) end date/time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit (scalar<count in [1, 10001[> | NULL) max bars (1-10000,

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    
                    
                      
    #'   default 1000).

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param page_token (scalar<character> | NULL) cursor for pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param sort (scalar<character> | NULL) `"asc"` (default) or `"desc"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (BarsMulti | promise<BarsMulti>) **one row per bar** with a

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    
                    
                      
    #'   leading `symbol` column. Bar columns mirror the equity `get_bars()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    
                    
                      
    #'   output: `timestamp` (POSIXct), `open`, `high`, `low`, `close`, `vwap`

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (numeric), `volume`, `trade_count` (integer).

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    
                    
                      
    #' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    
                    
                      
    #' bars <- opts$get_option_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "AAPL240621C00200000", timeframe = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    
                    
                      
    #'   start = "2024-06-01"

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    
                    
                      
    #' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(bars)

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_bars = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    
                    
                      
      symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    
                    
                      
      timeframe = "1Day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    
                    
                      
      start = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    
                    
                      
      end = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    
                    
                      
      page_token = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    
                    
                      
      sort = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    2x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_option_bars(

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    2x
                    
                      
        symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    2x
                    
                      
        timeframe,

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    2x
                    
                      
        start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    431
                    2x
                    
                      
        end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    432
                    2x
                    
                      
        limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    2x
                    
                      
        page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    2x
                    
                      
        sort

                    		
                  

                  

                    435
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    2x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    437
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/options/bars",

                    		
                  

                  

                    438
                    2x
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    439
                    2x
                    
                      
          symbols = symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    440
                    2x
                    
                      
          timeframe = timeframe,

                    		
                  

                  

                    441
                    2x
                    
                      
          start = start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    442
                    2x
                    
                      
          end = end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    443
                    2x
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    2x
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    2x
                    
                      
          sort = sort

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = parse_multi_bars

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    2x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    2x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    2x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_option_bars,

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    2x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    
                    
                      
    # nolint end

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    458
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Options Trades

                    		
                  

                  

                    459
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    460
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves historical trade data for options contracts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    461
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    462
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    463
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/trades`

                    		
                  

                  

                    464
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    465
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    466
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Options Trades](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optiontrades)

                    		
                  

                  

                    467
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    468
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    469
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    472
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/trades?symbols=AAPL250620C00200000&start=2025-03-01&limit=5'

                    		
                  

                  

                    473
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    474
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    475
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    476
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    477
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    478
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "trades": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    479
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620C00200000": [

                    		
                  

                  

                    480
                    
                    
                      
    #'       {

                    		
                  

                  

                    481
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-03T14:30:02.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    482
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "p": 12.35,

                    		
                  

                  

                    483
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "s": 10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    484
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "x": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    485
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": ["a", "I"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    486
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    487
                    
                    
                      
    #'       {

                    		
                  

                  

                    488
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-03T14:31:15.654321Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    489
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "p": 12.40,

                    		
                  

                  

                    490
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "s": 5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    491
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "x": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    492
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": ["a"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    493
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    494
                    
                    
                      
    #'     ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    495
                    
                    
                      
    #'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    496
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "next_page_token": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    497
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    498
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    499
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    500
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols (scalar<character>) comma-separated OCC option symbols.

                    		
                  

                  

                    501
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param start (scalar<character> | NULL) start date/time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    502
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param end (scalar<character> | NULL) end date/time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    503
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit (scalar<count in [1, 10001[> | NULL) max trades (1-10000,

                    		
                  

                  

                    504
                    
                    
                      
    #'   default 1000).

                    		
                  

                  

                    505
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param page_token (scalar<character> | NULL) cursor for pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    506
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param sort (scalar<character> | NULL) `"asc"` (default) or `"desc"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    507
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (OptionTradesMulti | promise<OptionTradesMulti>) **one row per

                    		
                  

                  

                    508
                    
                    
                      
    #'   trade** with a leading `symbol` column. Columns: `timestamp` (POSIXct),

                    		
                  

                  

                    509
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `price` (numeric), `size` (integer), `exchange` (character),

                    		
                  

                  

                    510
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `conditions` (character, `;`-separated trade condition codes or a

                    		
                  

                  

                    511
                    
                    
                      
    #'   single-character code; `NA` when none reported), `id` (integer). The

                    		
                  

                  

                    512
                    
                    
                      
    #'   options trade payload carries no consolidated tape, so there is no

                    		
                  

                  

                    513
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `tape` column (unlike the equity trade shape).

                    		
                  

                  

                    514
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_trades = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    515
                    
                    
                      
      symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    516
                    
                    
                      
      start = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    517
                    
                    
                      
      end = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    518
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    519
                    
                    
                      
      page_token = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    520
                    
                    
                      
      sort = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    521
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    522
                    !
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_option_trades(

                    		
                  

                  

                    523
                    !
                    
                      
        symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    524
                    !
                    
                      
        start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    525
                    !
                    
                      
        end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    526
                    !
                    
                      
        limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    527
                    !
                    
                      
        page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    528
                    !
                    
                      
        sort

                    		
                  

                  

                    529
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    530
                    !
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    531
                    !
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/options/trades",

                    		
                  

                  

                    532
                    !
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    533
                    !
                    
                      
          symbols = symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    534
                    !
                    
                      
          start = start,

                    		
                  

                  

                    535
                    !
                    
                      
          end = end,

                    		
                  

                  

                    536
                    !
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    537
                    !
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    538
                    !
                    
                      
          sort = sort

                    		
                  

                  

                    539
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    540
                    !
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    541
                    !
                    
                      
          trades_map <- data$trades

                    		
                  

                  

                    542
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is.null(trades_map) || length(trades_map) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    543
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_option_trades_multi())

                    		
                  

                  

                    544
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    545
                    !
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(trades_map), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    546
                    !
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_trades(trades_map[[sym]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    547
                    !
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    548
                    !
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    549
                    !
                    
                      
              data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    550
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    551
                    !
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    552
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    553
                    !
                    
                      
          return(data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    554
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    555
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    556
                    !
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    557
                    !

                    558
                    !

                    559
                    !

                    560

    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    564
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Latest Options Quotes

                    		
                  

                  

                    565
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    566
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the latest NBBO quotes for one or more options contracts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    567
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    568
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    569
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/quotes/latest`

                    		
                  

                  

                    570
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    571
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    572
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Latest Options Quotes](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optionlatestquotes)

                    		
                  

                  

                    573
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    574
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    575
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    576
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    577
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    578
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/quotes/latest?symbols=AAPL250620C00200000'

                    		
                  

                  

                    579
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    580
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    581
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    582
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    583
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    584
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "quotes": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    585
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620C00200000": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    586
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:58.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    587
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "ax": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    588
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "ap": 12.50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    589
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "as": 15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    590
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "bx": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    591
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "bp": 12.30,

                    		
                  

                  

                    592
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "bs": 22,

                    		
                  

                  

                    593
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    594
                    
                    
                      
    #'     }

                    		
                  

                  

                    595
                    
                    
                      
    #'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    596
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    597
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    598
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    599
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols (scalar<character>) comma-separated OCC option symbols.

                    		
                  

                  

                    600
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) `"opra"` (default, official OPRA

                    		
                  

                  

                    601
                    
                    
                      
    #'   feed) or `"indicative"` (free, delayed/modified).

                    		
                  

                  

                    602
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (OptionQuotesMulti | promise<OptionQuotesMulti>) **one row per

                    		
                  

                  

                    603
                    
                    
                      
    #'   contract** with a leading `symbol` column. Columns: `timestamp`

                    		
                  

                  

                    604
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (POSIXct); `ask_exchange`, `ask_price`, `ask_size`, `bid_exchange`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    605
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `bid_price`, `bid_size`; and `conditions` (character, `;`-separated

                    		
                  

                  

                    606
                    
                    
                      
    #'   quote condition codes or a single-character code; `NA` when none

                    		
                  

                  

                    607
                    
                    
                      
    #'   reported).

                    		
                  

                  

                    608
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_latest_quotes = function(symbols, feed = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    609
                    !
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_option_latest_quotes(symbols, feed)

                    		
                  

                  

                    610
                    !
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    611
                    !
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/options/quotes/latest",

                    		
                  

                  

                    612
                    !
                    
                      
        query = list(symbols = symbols, feed = feed),

                    		
                  

                  

                    613
                    !
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    614
                    !
                    
                      
          quotes_map <- data$quotes

                    		
                  

                  

                    615
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is.null(quotes_map) || length(quotes_map) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    616
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_option_quotes_multi())

                    		
                  

                  

                    617
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    618
                    !
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(quotes_map), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    619
                    !
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_quotes(list(quotes_map[[sym]]))

                    		
                  

                  

                    620
                    !
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    621
                    !
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    622
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    623
                    !
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    624
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    625
                    !
                    
                      
          dt <- data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    626
                    !
                    
                      
          if ("symbol" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    627
                    !
                    
                      
            data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    628
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    629
                    !
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    630
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    631
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    632
                    !
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    633
                    !
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    634
                    !
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_option_latest_quotes,

                    		
                  

                  

                    635
                    !
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    636
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    637
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    638
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    639

                    648

                    649

                    650
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    651
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    652
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    653

                    654

                    655

                    656

                    657

                    658

                    659

                    660

                    661

                    662

                    668

                    669

                    670

                    671
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    672
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols (scalar<character>) comma-separated OCC option symbols.

                    		
                  

                  

                    673
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) data feed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    674
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (OptionTradesMulti | promise<OptionTradesMulti>) **one row per

                    		
                  

                  

                    675

                    676

    #'   `conditions` (character, `;`-separated trade condition codes or a

                    679

                    680

                    681
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_latest_trades = function(symbols, feed = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    682
                    2x

                    683

                    684
                    2x
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/options/trades/latest",

                    		
                  

                  

                    685
                    2x

                    686
                    2x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    687
                    2x
                    
                      
          trades_map <- data$trades

                    		
                  

                  

                    688
                    2x

                    689
                    !

                    690
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    691
                    2x
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(trades_map), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    692
                    2x
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_trades(list(trades_map[[sym]]))

                    		
                  

                  

                    693
                    2x
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    694
                    2x
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    695

                    696
                    2x
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    697

                    698
                    2x

                    699
                    2x

    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    713

                    717
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    718
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    719
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/snapshots`

                    		
                  

                  

                    720
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    721
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    722
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Options Snapshots](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optionsnapshots)

                    		
                  

                  

                    723
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    724
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    725
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    726
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    727

                    729
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    730
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    731

                    732

                    733
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    734

                    735

                    744
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:58.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    745
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ax": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    746
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ap": 12.50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    747
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "as": 15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    748

                    749
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bp": 12.30,

                    751
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    752
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    753

                    754

                    755
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "delta": 0.5423,

                    		
                  

                  

                    756

                    757

                    758
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vega": 0.3215,

                    		
                  

                  

                    759
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "rho": 0.1456

                    		
                  

                  

                    760
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    761
                    
                    
                      
    #'     },

                    		
                  

                  

                    762
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620P00200000": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    763
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestTrade": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    764
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:57:30.456789Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    765
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "p": 8.75,

                    		
                  

                  

                    766

                    767

                    768

                    769

                    770
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestQuote": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    771
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:55.789012Z",
