                    772
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ax": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    773
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ap": 8.90,

                    		
                  

                  

                    774
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "as": 10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    775
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bx": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    776
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bp": 8.60,

                    		
                  

                  

                    777
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bs": 18,

                    		
                  

                  

                    778
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    779
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    780
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "impliedVolatility": 0.2712,

                    		
                  

                  

                    781
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "greeks": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    782
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "delta": -0.4577,

                    		
                  

                  

                    783
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "gamma": 0.0187,

                    		
                  

                  

                    784
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "theta": -0.0756,

                    		
                  

                  

                    785
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vega": 0.3215,

                    		
                  

                  

                    786
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "rho": -0.1289

                    		
                  

                  

                    787
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    788
                    
                    
                      
    #'     }

                    		
                  

                  

                    789
                    
                    
                      
    #'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    790
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    791
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    792
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    793
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbols (scalar<character>) comma-separated OCC option symbols.

                    		
                  

                  

                    794
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) `"opra"` (default) or

                    		
                  

                  

                    795
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"indicative"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    796
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param updated_since (scalar<character> | NULL) only return snapshots

                    		
                  

                  

                    797
                    
                    
                      
    #'   updated at or after this timestamp (RFC-3339 or `"YYYY-MM-DD"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    798
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit (scalar<count in [1, 1001[> | NULL) max snapshots (1-1000,

                    		
                  

                  

                    799
                    
                    
                      
    #'   default 100).

                    		
                  

                  

                    800
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param page_token (scalar<character> | NULL) cursor for pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    801
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (SnapshotMulti | promise<SnapshotMulti>) **one row per contract**.

                    		
                  

                  

                    802
                    
                    
                      
    #'   Columns: `symbol` (character, OCC option symbol); the flattened

                    		
                  

                  

                    803
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `latest_trade_*` / `latest_quote_*` / `minute_bar_*` / `daily_bar_*` /

                    		
                  

                  

                    804
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `prev_daily_bar_*` sections (see `get_snapshot()` for the per-field

                    		
                  

                  

                    805
                    
                    
                      
    #'   listing — `latest_trade_t` etc. expand to `latest_trade_timestamp` etc.;

                    		
                  

                  

                    806
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `latest_trade_conditions` / `latest_quote_conditions` are character

                    		
                  

                  

                    807
                    
                    
                      
    #'   columns, `;`-collapsed when Alpaca returns multiple codes); and the

                    		
                  

                  

                    808
                    
                    
                      
    #'   optional `implied_volatility` plus `greeks_delta` / `greeks_gamma` /

                    		
                  

                  

                    809
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `greeks_theta` / `greeks_vega` / `greeks_rho` (numeric) — present only

                    		
                  

                  

                    810
                    
                    
                      
    #'   when the account's options data subscription includes greeks/IV (absent

                    		
                  

                  

                    811
                    
                    
                      
    #'   on the default paper-trading `indicative` feed). Guard with

                    		
                  

                  

                    812
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `if ("implied_volatility" %in% names(dt)) ...` to handle both shapes.

                    		
                  

                  

                    813
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_snapshots = function(symbols, feed = NULL, updated_since = NULL, limit = NULL, page_token = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    814
                    !
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_option_snapshots(

                    		
                  

                  

                    815
                    !
                    
                      
        symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    816
                    !
                    
                      
        feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    817
                    !
                    
                      
        updated_since,

                    		
                  

                  

                    818
                    !
                    
                      
        limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    819
                    !
                    
                      
        page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    820
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    821
                    !
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    822
                    !
                    
                      
        endpoint = "/v1beta1/options/snapshots",

                    		
                  

                  

                    823
                    !
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    824
                    !
                    
                      
          symbols = symbols,

                    		
                  

                  

                    825
                    !
                    
                      
          feed = feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    826
                    !
                    
                      
          updated_since = updated_since,

                    		
                  

                  

                    827
                    !
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    828
                    !
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    829
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    830
                    !
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    831
                    !
                    
                      
          snaps <- data$snapshots

                    		
                  

                  

                    832
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is.null(snaps) || length(snaps) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    833
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_snapshots_multi())

                    		
                  

                  

                    834
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    835
                    !
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(snaps), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    836
                    !
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_snapshot(snaps[[sym]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    837
                    !
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    838
                    !
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    839
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    840
                    !
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    841
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    842
                    !
                    
                      
          dt <- data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    843
                    !
                    
                      
          if ("symbol" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    844
                    !
                    
                      
            data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    845
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    846
                    !
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    847
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    848
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    849
                    !
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    850
                    !
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    851
                    !
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_option_snapshots,

                    		
                  

                  

                    852
                    !
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    853
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    854
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    855
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    856
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    857
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Option Snapshot by Symbol

                    		
                  

                  

                    858
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    859
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves a real-time snapshot for a single options contract.

                    		
                  

                  

                    860
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    861
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    862
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/snapshots/{symbol}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    863
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    864
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    865
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Option Snapshot](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optionsnapshots)

                    		
                  

                  

                    866
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    867
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    868
                    
                    
                      
    #' Note: Alpaca no longer documents a per-symbol snapshot endpoint; the URL

                    		
                  

                  

                    869
                    
                    
                      
    #' `/v1beta1/options/snapshots/{symbol}` is the underlying-chain endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    870
                    
                    
                      
    #' (see `get_option_chain()`). For a true single-contract snapshot, prefer

                    		
                  

                  

                    871
                    
                    
                      
    #' `get_option_snapshots(symbols = "AAPL250620C00200000")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    872
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    873
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    874
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    875
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    876
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/snapshots/AAPL250620C00200000'

                    		
                  

                  

                    877
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    878
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    879
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    880
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    881
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    882
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "latestTrade": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    883
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "t": "2025-03-07T20:58:45.987654Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    884
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "p": 12.35,

                    		
                  

                  

                    885
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "s": 3,

                    		
                  

                  

                    886
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "x": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    887
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "c": ["a"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    888
                    
                    
                      
    #'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    889
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "latestQuote": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    890
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:58.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    891
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "ax": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    892
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "ap": 12.50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    893
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "as": 15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    894
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "bx": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    895
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "bp": 12.30,

                    		
                  

                  

                    896
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "bs": 22,

                    		
                  

                  

                    897
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    898
                    
                    
                      
    #'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    899
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "impliedVolatility": 0.2856,

                    		
                  

                  

                    900
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "greeks": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    901
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "delta": 0.5423,

                    		
                  

                  

                    902
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "gamma": 0.0187,

                    		
                  

                  

                    903
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "theta": -0.0842,

                    		
                  

                  

                    904
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "vega": 0.3215,

                    		
                  

                  

                    905
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "rho": 0.1456

                    		
                  

                  

                    906
                    
                    
                      
    #'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    907
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    908
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    909
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    910
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param symbol (scalar<character>) OCC option symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    911
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) data feed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    912
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (SnapshotMulti | promise<SnapshotMulti>) the same shape as

                    		
                  

                  

                    913
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `get_option_chain()` — one row per contract in the chain rooted at

                    		
                  

                  

                    914
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `symbol`. Despite the legacy name, this is **not** a single-contract

                    		
                  

                  

                    915
                    
                    
                      
    #'   snapshot; for that, use `get_option_snapshots(symbols = "<OCC>")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    916
                    
                    
                      
    #' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    917
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    918
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    919
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    920
                    
                    
                      
    #' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    921
                    
                    
                      
    #' snap <- opts$get_option_snapshot("AAPL240621C00200000")

                    		
                  

                  

                    922
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(snap)

                    		
                  

                  

                    923
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    924
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_snapshot = function(symbol, feed = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    925
                    1x
                    
                      
      rlang::warn(

                    		
                  

                  

                    926
                    1x
                    
                      
        paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    927
                    1x
                    
                      
          "`get_option_snapshot()` is deprecated. The URL it calls ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    928
                    1x
                    
                      
          "(/v1beta1/options/snapshots/{symbol}) is now the ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    929
                    1x
                    
                      
          "underlying-chain endpoint, not a per-contract snapshot. ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    930
                    1x
                    
                      
          "For a single contract use `get_option_snapshots(symbols = \"<OCC>\")`; ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    931
                    1x
                    
                      
          "for the full chain rooted at an underlying use `get_option_chain()`. ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    932
                    1x
                    
                      
          "This call now delegates to `get_option_chain(symbol)`."

                    		
                  

                  

                    933
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    934
                    1x
                    
                      
        .frequency = "regularly",

                    		
                  

                  

                    935
                    1x
                    
                      
        .frequency_id = "get_option_snapshot_deprecated"

                    		
                  

                  

                    936
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    937
                    1x
                    
                      
      return(self$get_option_chain(underlying_symbol = symbol, feed = feed))

                    		
                  

                  

                    938
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    939
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    940
                    
                    
                      
    # nolint start: line_length_linter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    941
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    942
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get Options Chain

                    		
                  

                  

                    943
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    944
                    
                    
                      
    #' Retrieves the full options chain for an underlying symbol. Returns all

                    		
                  

                  

                    945
                    
                    
                      
    #' available contracts with their latest market data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    946
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    947
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    948
                    
                    
                      
    #' `GET https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/snapshots/{underlying_symbol}`

                    		
                  

                  

                    949
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    950
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    951
                    
                    
                      
    #' - [Options Chain / Snapshots by Underlying](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/optionchain)

                    		
                  

                  

                    952
                    
                    
                      
    #' Verified: 2026-05-21

                    		
                  

                  

                    953
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    954
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### curl

                    		
                  

                  

                    955
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    956
                    
                    
                      
    #' curl -H "APCA-API-KEY-ID: $KEY" -H "APCA-API-SECRET-KEY: $SECRET" \

                    		
                  

                  

                    957
                    
                    
                      
    #'   'https://data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/options/snapshots/AAPL?type=call&expiration_date_gte=2025-06-01&strike_price_gte=190&strike_price_lte=210&limit=5'

                    		
                  

                  

                    958
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    959
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    960
                    
                    
                      
    #' ### JSON Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    961
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```json

                    		
                  

                  

                    962
                    
                    
                      
    #' {

                    		
                  

                  

                    963
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "snapshots": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    964
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620C00195000": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    965
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestTrade": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    966
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:55:12.345678Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    967
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "p": 15.20,

                    		
                  

                  

                    968
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "s": 2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    969
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "x": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    970
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": ["a"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    971
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    972
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestQuote": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    973
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:50.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    974
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ax": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    975
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ap": 15.40,

                    		
                  

                  

                    976
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "as": 12,

                    		
                  

                  

                    977
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bx": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    978
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bp": 15.00,

                    		
                  

                  

                    979
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bs": 20,

                    		
                  

                  

                    980
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    981
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    982
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "impliedVolatility": 0.2734,

                    		
                  

                  

                    983
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "greeks": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    984
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "delta": 0.6012,

                    		
                  

                  

                    985
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "gamma": 0.0165,

                    		
                  

                  

                    986
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "theta": -0.0912,

                    		
                  

                  

                    987
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vega": 0.3089,

                    		
                  

                  

                    988
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "rho": 0.1623

                    		
                  

                  

                    989
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    990
                    
                    
                      
    #'     },

                    		
                  

                  

                    991
                    
                    
                      
    #'     "AAPL250620C00200000": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    992
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestTrade": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    993
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:58:45.987654Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    994
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "p": 12.35,

                    		
                  

                  

                    995
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "s": 3,

                    		
                  

                  

                    996
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "x": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    997
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": ["a"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    998
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    999
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "latestQuote": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1000
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "t": "2025-03-07T20:59:58.123456Z",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1001
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ax": "C",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1002
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "ap": 12.50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1003
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "as": 15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1004
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bx": "P",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1005
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bp": 12.30,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1006
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "bs": 22,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1007
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "c": "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    1008
                    
                    
                      
    #'       },

                    		
                  

                  

                    1009
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "impliedVolatility": 0.2856,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1010
                    
                    
                      
    #'       "greeks": {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1011
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "delta": 0.5423,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1012
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "gamma": 0.0187,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1013
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "theta": -0.0842,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1014
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "vega": 0.3215,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1015
                    
                    
                      
    #'         "rho": 0.1456

                    		
                  

                  

                    1016
                    
                    
                      
    #'       }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1017
                    
                    
                      
    #'     }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1018
                    
                    
                      
    #'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    1019
                    
                    
                      
    #'   "next_page_token": null

                    		
                  

                  

                    1020
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1021
                    
                    
                      
    #' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    1022
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1023
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param underlying_symbol (scalar<character>) the underlying ticker symbol

                    		
                  

                  

                    1024
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (e.g., `"AAPL"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1025
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param type (scalar<character> | NULL) `"call"`, `"put"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1026
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date (scalar<character> | NULL) exact expiration date

                    		
                  

                  

                    1027
                    
                    
                      
    #'   (`"YYYY-MM-DD"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1028
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date_gte (scalar<character> | NULL) expiration on or

                    		
                  

                  

                    1029
                    
                    
                      
    #'   after this date.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1030
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param expiration_date_lte (scalar<character> | NULL) expiration on or

                    		
                  

                  

                    1031
                    
                    
                      
    #'   before this date.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1032
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param strike_price_gte (scalar<numeric> | NULL) minimum strike price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1033
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param strike_price_lte (scalar<numeric> | NULL) maximum strike price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1034
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param root_symbol (scalar<character> | NULL) options root symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1035
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param feed (scalar<character> | NULL) `"opra"` (default) or

                    		
                  

                  

                    1036
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `"indicative"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1037
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param limit (scalar<count in [1, 1001[> | NULL) max results (1-1000,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1038
                    
                    
                      
    #'   default 100).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1039
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param updated_since (scalar<character> | NULL) only snapshots updated at

                    		
                  

                  

                    1040
                    
                    
                      
    #'   or after this timestamp (RFC-3339 or `"YYYY-MM-DD"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    1041
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param page_token (scalar<character> | NULL) cursor for pagination.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1042
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return (SnapshotMulti | promise<SnapshotMulti>) **one row per contract in

                    		
                  

                  

                    1043
                    
                    
                      
    #'   the chain**. Columns mirror `get_option_snapshots()`: a `symbol` key, the

                    		
                  

                  

                    1044
                    
                    
                      
    #'   flattened `latest_trade_*` / `latest_quote_*` / `minute_bar_*` /

                    		
                  

                  

                    1045
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `daily_bar_*` / `prev_daily_bar_*` blocks (including

                    		
                  

                  

                    1046
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `latest_trade_conditions` / `latest_quote_conditions`), and — when the

                    		
                  

                  

                    1047
                    
                    
                      
    #'   account's options data subscription includes them — the optional

                    		
                  

                  

                    1048
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `implied_volatility` and `greeks_delta` / `greeks_gamma` /

                    		
                  

                  

                    1049
                    
                    
                      
    #'   `greeks_theta` / `greeks_vega` / `greeks_rho` columns. The greeks/IV

                    		
                  

                  

                    1050
                    
                    
                      
    #'   columns are absent for the default paper-trading `indicative` feed

                    		
                  

                  

                    1051
                    
                    
                      
    #'   without a subscription.

                    		
                  

                  

                    1052
                    
                    
                      
    #'

                    		
                  

                  

                    1053
                    
                    
                      
    #' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    1054
                    
                    
                      
    #' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    1055
                    
                    
                      
    #' opts <- AlpacaOptions$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    1056
                    
                    
                      
    #' chain <- opts$get_option_chain("AAPL", type = "call",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1057
                    
                    
                      
    #'                                 expiration_date_gte = "2024-06-01")

                    		
                  

                  

                    1058
                    
                    
                      
    #' print(chain)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1059
                    
                    
                      
    #' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1060
                    
                    
                      
    get_option_chain = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1061
                    
                    
                      
      underlying_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1062
                    
                    
                      
      type = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1063
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1064
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date_gte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1065
                    
                    
                      
      expiration_date_lte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1066
                    
                    
                      
      strike_price_gte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1067
                    
                    
                      
      strike_price_lte = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1068
                    
                    
                      
      root_symbol = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1069
                    
                    
                      
      feed = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1070
                    
                    
                      
      limit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1071
                    
                    
                      
      page_token = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1072
                    
                    
                      
      updated_since = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    1073
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1074
                    4x
                    
                      
      assert_args_AlpacaOptions__get_option_chain(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1075
                    4x
                    
                      
        underlying_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1076
                    4x
                    
                      
        type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1077
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1078
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1079
                    4x
                    
                      
        expiration_date_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1080
                    4x
                    
                      
        strike_price_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1081
                    4x
                    
                      
        strike_price_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1082
                    4x
                    
                      
        root_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1083
                    4x
                    
                      
        feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1084
                    4x
                    
                      
        limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1085
                    4x
                    
                      
        updated_since,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1086
                    4x
                    
                      
        page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    1087
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    1088
                    4x
                    
                      
      assert::assert_nonempty_strings(underlying_symbol)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1089
                    4x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_gte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1090
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_gte <- as.character(strike_price_gte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1091
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1092
                    4x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(strike_price_lte)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1093
                    !
                    
                      
        strike_price_lte <- as.character(strike_price_lte)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1094
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1095
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    1096
                    4x
                    
                      
      result <- private$.data_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1097
                    4x
                    
                      
        endpoint = paste0("/v1beta1/options/snapshots/", underlying_symbol),

                    		
                  

                  

                    1098
                    4x
                    
                      
        query = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1099
                    4x
                    
                      
          type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1100
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date = expiration_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1101
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_gte = expiration_date_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1102
                    4x
                    
                      
          expiration_date_lte = expiration_date_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1103
                    4x
                    
                      
          strike_price_gte = strike_price_gte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1104
                    4x
                    
                      
          strike_price_lte = strike_price_lte,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1105
                    4x
                    
                      
          root_symbol = root_symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1106
                    4x
                    
                      
          feed = feed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1107
                    4x
                    
                      
          limit = limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1108
                    4x
                    
                      
          page_token = page_token,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1109
                    4x
                    
                      
          updated_since = updated_since

                    		
                  

                  

                    1110
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    1111
                    4x
                    
                      
        .parser = function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1112
                    4x
                    
                      
          snaps <- data$snapshots

                    		
                  

                  

                    1113
                    4x
                    
                      
          if (is.null(snaps) || length(snaps) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1114
                    !
                    
                      
            return(empty_dt_snapshots_multi())

                    		
                  

                  

                    1115
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1116
                    4x
                    
                      
          dts <- lapply(names(snaps), function(sym) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1117
                    7x
                    
                      
            dt <- parse_snapshot(snaps[[sym]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    1118
                    7x
                    
                      
            if (nrow(dt) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1119
                    7x
                    
                      
              dt[, symbol := sym]

                    		
                  

                  

                    1120
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1121
                    7x
                    
                      
            return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    1122
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    1123
                    4x
                    
                      
          dt <- data.table::rbindlist(dts, fill = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1124
                    4x
                    
                      
          if ("symbol" %in% names(dt)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1125
                    4x
                    
                      
            data.table::setcolorder(dt, c("symbol", setdiff(names(dt), "symbol")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1126
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1127
                    4x
                    
                      
          return(dt[])

                    		
                  

                  

                    1128
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1129
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    1130
                    4x
                    
                      
      return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1131
                    4x
                    
                      
        result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1132
                    4x
                    
                      
        assert_return_AlpacaOptions__get_option_chain,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1133
                    4x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    1134
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1135
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1136
                    
                    
                      
    # nolint end

                    		
                  

                  

                    1137
                    
                    
                      
  ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    1138
                    
                    
                      
  private = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1139
                    
                    
                      
    .data_base_url = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1140
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    1141
                    
                    
                      
    # Execute a market data API request (uses data base URL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    1142
                    
                    
                      
    .data_request = function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1143
                    
                    
                      
      endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1144
                    
                    
                      
      query = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    1145
                    
                    
                      
      .parser = identity,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1146
                    
                    
                      
      timeout = 30

                    		
                  

                  

                    1147
                    
                    
                      
    ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    1148
                    8x
                    
                      
      return(alpaca_build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    1149
                    8x
                    
                      
        base_url = private$.data_base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1150
                    8x
                    
                      
        endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1151
                    8x
                    
                      
        method = "GET",

                    		
                  

                  

                    1152
                    8x
                    
                      
        query = query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1153
                    8x
                    
                      
        keys = private$.keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1154
                    8x
                    
                      
        .perform = private$.perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1155
                    8x
                    
                      
        .parser = .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1156
                    8x
                    
                      
        is_async = private$.is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    1157
                    8x
                    
                      
        timeout = timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    1158
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    1159
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    1160
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    1161
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/AlpacaTrading.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# R6 class for Alpaca order management.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' AlpacaTrading: Order Management

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Provides methods for placing, modifying, cancelling, and querying orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' on Alpaca's Trading API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' Inherits from [AlpacaBase]. All methods support both synchronous and

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' asynchronous execution depending on the `async` parameter at construction.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Purpose and Scope

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Place Orders**: Market, limit, stop, stop-limit, and trailing stop orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Order Classes**: Simple, bracket, OCO, and OTO orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Modify Orders**: Replace existing orders with updated parameters.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Cancel Orders**: Cancel individual orders or all open orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' - **Query Orders**: List open, closed, or all orders with filtering.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Official Documentation

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' [Orders](https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/reference/orders-4)

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' Verified: 2026-05-22

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Endpoints Covered

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' | Method | Endpoint | HTTP |

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' |--------|----------|------|

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' | add_order | `POST /v2/orders` | POST |

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_orders | `GET /v2/orders` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_order | `GET /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' | get_order_by_client_id | `GET /v2/orders:by_client_order_id` | GET |

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' | modify_order | `PATCH /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | PATCH |

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_order | `DELETE /v2/orders/\{order_id\}` | DELETE |

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' | cancel_all_orders | `DELETE /v2/orders` | DELETE |
