                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param symbol (scalar<character> | NULL) ticker symbol (e.g., `"AAPL"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   Required for all order classes except `"mleg"` (multi-leg options), where

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   each leg carries its own symbol.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param side (scalar<character> | NULL) `"buy"` or `"sell"`. Required for all

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   order classes except `"mleg"`, where each leg carries its own side.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @param type (scalar<character>) order type.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_in_force (scalar<character>) `"day"`, `"gtc"`, `"opg"`, `"cls"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"ioc"`, `"fok"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @param qty (scalar<numeric> | NULL) number of shares.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @param notional (scalar<numeric> | NULL) dollar amount (market/day orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   only).

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' @param limit_price (scalar<numeric> | NULL) limit price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @param stop_price (scalar<numeric> | NULL) stop trigger price.

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @param trail_price (scalar<numeric> | NULL) trailing stop dollar offset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @param trail_percent (scalar<numeric> | NULL) trailing stop percentage offset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param extended_hours (scalar<logical> | NULL) allow pre/post market.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @param client_order_id (scalar<character> | NULL) unique client order ID

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   (max 128 chars).

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param order_class (scalar<character> | NULL) `"simple"`, `"bracket"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"oco"`, `"oto"`, or `"mleg"` (multi-leg options). Case-insensitive; empty

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   string is treated as NULL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @param take_profit (list | NULL) `list(limit_price = ...)` for bracket

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @param stop_loss (list | NULL) `list(stop_price = ..., limit_price = ...)`

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   for bracket orders.

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @param position_intent (scalar<character> | NULL) `"buy_to_open"`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"buy_to_close"`, `"sell_to_open"`, `"sell_to_close"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @param legs (list | NULL) leg objects for multi-leg options orders

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   (`order_class = "mleg"`). Max 4 legs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @param advanced_instructions (list | NULL) advanced routing instructions for

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   the Alpaca Elite Smart Router.

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (list) validated order parameters (NULLs removed).

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rlang abort arg_match0

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
validate_order_params <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  symbol = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  side = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
  type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  time_in_force,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  qty = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
  notional = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
  limit_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
  stop_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
  trail_price = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  trail_percent = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
  extended_hours = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
  client_order_id = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  order_class = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  take_profit = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
  stop_loss = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
  position_intent = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
  legs = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  advanced_instructions = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  # Normalise order_class first: empty string is equivalent to NULL, and

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
  # match case-insensitively so callers don't have to remember the casing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    38x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(order_class)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    12x
                    
                      
    if (!is.character(order_class) || length(order_class) != 1L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'order_class' must be a single character string.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    12x
                    
                      
    if (identical(order_class, "")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    1x
                    
                      
      order_class <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    11x
                    
                      
      order_class <- tolower(order_class)

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    38x
                    
                      
  is_mleg <- identical(order_class, "mleg")

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    38x
                    
                      
  type <- tolower(type)

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    38x
                    
                      
  time_in_force <- tolower(time_in_force)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    38x
                    
                      
  if (!is_mleg) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    # Non-mleg orders require both symbol and side. mleg orders carry these

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    # on each leg, so the top-level fields are optional.

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    29x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(symbol) || !is.character(symbol) || !nzchar(symbol)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    2x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    2x
                    
                      
        "Parameter 'symbol' must be a non-empty character string (omit only for `order_class = \"mleg\"`)."

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    27x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(side) || !is.character(side) || !nzchar(side)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    1x
                    
                      
        "Parameter 'side' must be 'buy' or 'sell' (omit only for `order_class = \"mleg\"`)."

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    26x
                    
                      
    side <- tolower(side)

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    26x
                    
                      
    rlang::arg_match0(side, c("buy", "sell"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
    # mleg orders require legs (each leg carries its own symbol/side/qty).

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    9x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(legs) || length(legs) == 0L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("`legs` is required for `order_class = \"mleg\"` (provide a list of leg objects).")

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    8x
                    
                      
    if (length(legs) > 4L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(paste0("`legs` may contain at most 4 entries (got ", length(legs), ")."))

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    7x
                    
                      
    if (!is.list(legs)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("`legs` must be a list of leg objects (each itself a list).")

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    7x
                    
                      
    bad <- which(

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    7x
                    
                      
      !vapply(

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    7x
                    
                      
        legs,

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    7x
                    
                      
        function(leg) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    13x
                    
                      
          return(

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    13x
                    
                      
            is.list(leg) &&

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    13x
                    
                      
              all(c("symbol", "side", "ratio_qty") %in% names(leg))

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    7x
                    
                      
        logical(1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    7x
                    
                      
    if (length(bad) > 0L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
        "Each entry in `legs` must be a list with at least `symbol`, `side`, ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    !
                    
                      
        "and `ratio_qty` fields. Offending leg position(s): ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
        paste(bad, collapse = ", "),

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
        "."

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
    # Alpaca's multi-leg options endpoint only accepts market and limit

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    # order types. Stop / stop_limit / trailing_stop are single-leg-only;

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
    # the server rejects them with an opaque error, so catch it locally.

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    7x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(type) && !(tolower(type) %in% c("market", "limit"))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    3x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    3x
                    
                      
        "`order_class = \"mleg\"` only supports `type = \"market\"` or ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    3x
                    
                      
        "`type = \"limit\"` (got '",

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    3x
                    
                      
        type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    3x
                    
                      
        "'). Stop / stop-limit / ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    3x
                    
                      
        "trailing-stop are single-leg-only on Alpaca."

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
    # `notional` is documented as market/equity only — mleg requires

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
    # contract quantities, which the per-leg `ratio_qty` carries. Sending

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    # a top-level `notional` is rejected by the server.

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    4x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(notional)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    1x
                    
                      
        "`notional` is not supported for `order_class = \"mleg\"`. ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    1x
                    
                      
        "Multi-leg orders use per-leg `ratio_qty`; pass `qty` at the ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    1x
                    
                      
        "top level if you need to scale all legs together."

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    28x
                    
                      
  rlang::arg_match0(type, c("market", "limit", "stop", "stop_limit", "trailing_stop"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    27x
                    
                      
  rlang::arg_match0(time_in_force, c("day", "gtc", "opg", "cls", "ioc", "fok"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
  # Convert numerics to character for the API

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    25x
                    
                      
    qty <- as.character(qty)

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(notional)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    3x
                    
                      
    notional <- as.character(notional)

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(limit_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    7x
                    
                      
    limit_price <- as.character(limit_price)

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(stop_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    3x
                    
                      
    stop_price <- as.character(stop_price)

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(trail_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    1x
                    
                      
    trail_price <- as.character(trail_price)

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(trail_percent)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    2x
                    
                      
    trail_percent <- as.character(trail_percent)

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
  # Type-specific validation

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    27x
                    
                      
  if (type == "market") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    14x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(qty) && is.null(notional)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Either 'qty' or 'notional' must be specified for market orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    13x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(qty) && !is.null(notional)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    2x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameters 'qty' and 'notional' are mutually exclusive.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    13x
                    
                      
  } else if (type == "limit") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    8x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'qty' is required for limit orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(limit_price)) abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'limit_price' is required for limit orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    5x
                    
                      
  } else if (type == "stop") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    1x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'qty' is required for stop orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
    if (is.null(stop_price)) abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'stop_price' is required for stop orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    4x
                    
                      
  } else if (type == "stop_limit") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'qty' is required for stop-limit orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(stop_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'stop_price' is required for stop-limit orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(limit_price)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'limit_price' is required for stop-limit orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    2x
                    
                      
  } else if (type == "trailing_stop") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(qty)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'qty' is required for trailing stop orders.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (is.null(trail_price) && is.null(trail_percent)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    !
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error(

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    !
                    
                      
        "Either 'trail_price' or 'trail_percent' must be specified for trailing stop orders."

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(trail_price) && !is.null(trail_percent)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    1x
                    
                      
      abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameters 'trail_price' and 'trail_percent' are mutually exclusive.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
  # Optional parameter validation

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    20x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(order_class) && nzchar(order_class)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    5x
                    
                      
    rlang::arg_match0(order_class, c("simple", "bracket", "oco", "oto", "mleg"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    19x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(position_intent)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    1x
                    
                      
    rlang::arg_match0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    1x
                    
                      
      position_intent,

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    1x
                    
                      
      c("buy_to_open", "buy_to_close", "sell_to_open", "sell_to_close")

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    19x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(client_order_id) && nchar(client_order_id) > 128L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    1x
                    
                      
    abort_alpaca_validation_error("Parameter 'client_order_id' must not exceed 128 characters.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
  # Build the result list, dropping NULLs

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    18x
                    
                      
  params <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    18x
                    
                      
    symbol = symbol,

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    18x
                    
                      
    side = side,

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    18x
                    
                      
    type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    18x
                    
                      
    time_in_force = time_in_force,

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    18x
                    
                      
    qty = qty,

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    18x
                    
                      
    notional = notional,

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    18x
                    
                      
    limit_price = limit_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    18x
                    
                      
    stop_price = stop_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    18x
                    
                      
    trail_price = trail_price,

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    18x
                    
                      
    trail_percent = trail_percent,

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    18x
                    
                      
    extended_hours = extended_hours,

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    18x
                    
                      
    client_order_id = client_order_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    18x
                    
                      
    order_class = order_class,

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    18x
                    
                      
    take_profit = take_profit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    18x
                    
                      
    stop_loss = stop_loss,

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    18x
                    
                      
    position_intent = position_intent,

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    18x
                    
                      
    legs = legs,

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    18x
                    
                      
    advanced_instructions = advanced_instructions

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    18x
                    
                      
  params <- params[!vapply(params, is.null, logical(1))]

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    18x
                    
                      
  return(params)

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/helpers_request.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Free-function request helpers for the alpaca package. The single request

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
# funnel and the sync/async branch point come from connectcore; this file keeps

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
# the Alpaca-specific error envelope, the header-auth signer, the cursor

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
# paginator, and the thin `alpaca_build_request()` wrapper the bulk-bar and

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
# market-data paths use directly.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' Sign an Alpaca request with API-key headers

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' Adds Alpaca's two authentication headers (`APCA-API-KEY-ID`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' `APCA-API-SECRET-KEY`) from the supplied credentials. Alpaca uses plain

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' header credentials, not request signing, so this is the connector's `.sign()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' seam: no timestamp or HMAC is involved.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param req (class<httr2_request>) the request to sign.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys (list) credentials with `api_key` and `api_secret`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param ctx (list) signing context (unused — Alpaca needs no server clock).

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (class<httr2_request>) the request with the two API-key headers added.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom httr2 req_headers

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_sign <- function(req, keys, ctx = list()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    54x
                    
                      
  return(httr2::req_headers(

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    54x
                    
                      
    req,

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    54x
                    
                      
    `APCA-API-KEY-ID` = keys$api_key,

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    54x
                    
                      
    `APCA-API-SECRET-KEY` = keys$api_secret

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' Serialise an Alpaca request body to its exact wire bytes

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' Pre-serialises a body list to the JSON string Alpaca expects, reproducing the

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' byte-for-byte output the package produced before the connectcore migration.

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' The pre-migration funnel sent bodies through `httr2::req_body_json()`, which

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' serialises with `jsonlite::toJSON(auto_unbox = TRUE, digits = 22, null =

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' "null")`; this helper uses those exact options so the migrated transport

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' (which sends the result verbatim via connectcore's `body_format = "raw"`

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' path) is wire-identical.

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' The one deliberate departure is the `symbols` field. Alpaca's watchlist

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' endpoints require `symbols` to be a JSON array, but `auto_unbox = TRUE`

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' collapses a single-element character vector to a bare scalar (`"AAPL"`

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' instead of `["AAPL"]`), which the API rejects. Wrapping `symbols` in

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' [as.list()] keeps it an array for any length without touching any other

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' field's bytes.

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' @param body (list) the request body. NULL entries are dropped first

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   (matching the pre-migration funnel).

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (scalar<character> | NULL) the serialised JSON body, or `NULL` when

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   the body prunes to nothing (the pre-migration funnel sent no body in that

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'   case).

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_serialize_body <- function(body) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    18x
                    
                      
  assert_args_alpaca_serialize_body(body)

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    18x
                    
                      
  body <- body[!vapply(body, is.null, logical(1))]

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    18x
                    
                      
  if (length(body) == 0L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    2x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_alpaca_serialize_body(NULL))

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    16x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(body$symbols)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
    # Keep `symbols` a JSON array even for a single symbol; auto_unbox would

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
    # otherwise emit a scalar, which Alpaca's watchlist endpoints reject.

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    7x
                    
                      
    body$symbols <- as.list(body$symbols)

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    16x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_alpaca_serialize_body(as.character(jsonlite::toJSON(

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    16x
                    
                      
    body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    16x
                    
                      
    auto_unbox = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    16x
                    
                      
    digits = 22,

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    16x
                    
                      
    null = "null"

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  ))))

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' Build and Execute an Alpaca API Request

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#' Constructs an [httr2::request], adds authentication headers, performs it via

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#' the supplied `.perform` function, and parses the JSON response. This is the

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' single point through which the bulk-bar and market-data paths flow; it

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#' delegates the transport to [connectcore::build_request()] and supplies the

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca header signer and error-envelope parser.

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' ### Authentication

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca uses header-based authentication with two headers:

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' - `APCA-API-KEY-ID`: Your API key ID

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#' - `APCA-API-SECRET-KEY`: Your API secret key

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#' @param base_url (scalar<character>) the API base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#' @param endpoint (scalar<character>) the API path (e.g., `"/v2/account"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#' @param method (scalar<character>) HTTP method. Default `"GET"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#' @param query (list) query parameters. Default `list()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' @param body (list | NULL) JSON request body (for POST/PATCH). Default `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys (list | NULL) API credentials with `api_key` and `api_secret`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `NULL` (no auth).

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .perform (function) the httr2 perform function. Default

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#'   `httr2::req_perform`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .parser (function) post-processing function applied to parsed

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#'   response. Default `identity`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#' @param is_async (scalar<logical>) whether `.perform` returns promises.

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `FALSE`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#' @param timeout (scalar<numeric in ]0, Inf[>) request timeout in seconds.

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `10`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#' @param simplifyVector (scalar<logical>) passed to [httr2::resp_body_json].

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `FALSE`. Set to `TRUE` for endpoints returning parallel arrays so

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'   JSON nulls become NA in atomic vectors.

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (any | promise<any>) parsed and post-processed API response data, or

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#'   a promise thereof.

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom httr2 req_perform

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_build_request <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
  base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
  endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  method = "GET",

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  query = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
  body = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
  keys = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
  .perform = httr2::req_perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
  .parser = identity,

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  is_async = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
  timeout = 10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
  simplifyVector = FALSE # nolint: object_name_linter. mirrors httr2::resp_body_json's argument name verbatim.

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    56x
                    
                      
  assert_args_alpaca_build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    56x
                    
                      
    base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    56x
                    
                      
    endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    56x
                    
                      
    method,

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    56x
                    
                      
    query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    56x
                    
                      
    body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    56x
                    
                      
    keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    56x
                    
                      
    .perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    56x
                    
                      
    .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    56x
                    
                      
    is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    56x
                    
                      
    timeout,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    56x
                    
                      
    simplifyVector

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    56x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_alpaca_build_request(connectcore::build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    56x
                    
                      
    base_url = base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    56x
                    
                      
    endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    56x
                    
                      
    method = method,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    56x
                    
                      
    query = query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    56x
                    
                      
    body = body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    56x
                    
                      
    keys = keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    56x
                    
                      
    sign = alpaca_sign,

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    56x
                    
                      
    parse_envelope = function(resp) parse_alpaca_response(resp, simplifyVector = simplifyVector),

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    56x
                    
                      
    body_format = "json",

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    56x
                    
                      
    .perform = .perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    56x
                    
                      
    .parser = .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    56x
                    
                      
    is_async = is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    56x
                    
                      
    timeout = timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
  )))

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
#' Auto-Paginate an Alpaca API Endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
#' Follows Alpaca's cursor-based pagination (`page_token` / `next_page_token`)

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
#' automatically, accumulating results across all pages. Works with any

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
#' paginated endpoint (orders, activities, bars, trades, quotes, etc.).

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
#' Alpaca endpoints return a `next_page_token` field when more results are

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
#' available. This function loops through pages until no more tokens remain

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
#' or `max_pages` is reached, then applies `.parser` to the combined result

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
#' list.

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
#' If `max_pages` is hit while the server still reports more data

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
#' (`next_page_token` present), the accumulated pages are returned anyway —

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
#' fetched work is never thrown away — but an `rlang::warn()` fires so the

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
