#' truncation can never pass silently. Resume by re-requesting with a later

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
#' `start` (bars/trades/quotes are time-ordered) or by raising `max_pages`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
#' @param base_url (scalar<character>) the API base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
#' @param endpoint (scalar<character>) the API path (e.g., `"/v2/orders"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
#' @param method (scalar<character>) HTTP method. Default `"GET"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
#' @param query (list) query parameters. Default `list()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys (list | NULL) API credentials.

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .perform (function) the httr2 perform function.

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .parser (function) applied to the accumulated list of page items.

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
#'   Receives a single flat list of all items across pages.

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
#' @param is_async (scalar<logical>) whether `.perform` returns promises.

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
#' @param items_field (scalar<character> | NULL) the JSON field containing the

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
#'   array of items (e.g., `"bars"`, `"trades"`, `"quotes"`). If `NULL`, the

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
#'   entire response list is accumulated (for endpoints returning top-level

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
#'   arrays).

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
#' @param max_pages (scalar<numeric in [1, Inf]> | scalar<integer in [1, Inf[>) maximum

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
#'   number of pages to fetch. Default `Inf`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sleep (scalar<numeric in [0, Inf[>) seconds to pause between page

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
#'   requests, to respect rate limits (Alpaca's free/Basic data tier caps at

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
#'   200 req/min). Applied in synchronous mode only. Default `0`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
#' @param timeout (scalar<numeric in ]0, Inf[>) request timeout in seconds.

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `10`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (any | promise<any>) parsed and post-processed API response data, or

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
#'   a promise thereof.

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
#' # Fetch ALL historical bars across pages

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
#' all_bars <- alpaca_paginate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
#'   base_url = "https://data.alpaca.markets",

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
#'   endpoint = "/v2/stocks/AAPL/bars",

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
#'   query = list(timeframe = "1Day", start = "2020-01-01"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
#'   keys = get_api_keys(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
#'   items_field = "bars",

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
#'   .parser = parse_bars

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom httr2 req_perform

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
alpaca_paginate <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
  base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
  endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
  method = "GET",

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
  query = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
  keys = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
  .perform = httr2::req_perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
  .parser = identity,

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
  is_async = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
  items_field = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
  max_pages = Inf,

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
  sleep = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
  timeout = 10

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    11x
                    
                      
  assert_args_alpaca_paginate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    11x
                    
                      
    base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    11x
                    
                      
    endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    11x
                    
                      
    method,

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    11x
                    
                      
    query,

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    11x
                    
                      
    keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    11x
                    
                      
    .perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    11x
                    
                      
    .parser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    11x
                    
                      
    is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    11x
                    
                      
    items_field,

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    11x
                    
                      
    max_pages,

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    11x
                    
                      
    sleep,

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    11x
                    
                      
    timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    11x
                    
                      
  accumulator <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    11x
                    
                      
  page_count <- 0L

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    11x
                    
                      
  fetch_page <- function(page_token = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    16x
                    
                      
    q <- query

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    16x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(page_token)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    5x
                    
                      
      q$page_token <- page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    16x
                    
                      
    result <- alpaca_build_request(

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    16x
                    
                      
      base_url = base_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    16x
                    
                      
      endpoint = endpoint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    16x
                    
                      
      method = method,

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    16x
                    
                      
      query = q,

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    16x
                    
                      
      keys = keys,

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    16x
                    
                      
      .perform = .perform,

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    16x
                    
                      
      is_async = is_async,

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    16x
                    
                      
      timeout = timeout

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    16x
                    
                      
    return(connectcore::then_or_now(

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    16x
                    
                      
      result,

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    16x
                    
                      
      function(data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    16x
                    
                      
        page_count <<- page_count + 1L

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    16x
                    
                      
        if (!is.null(items_field)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    15x
                    
                      
          page_items <- data[[items_field]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      
        } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    1x
                    
                      
          page_items <- data

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    16x
                    
                      
        if (!is.null(page_items) && length(page_items) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    16x
                    
                      
          accumulator <<- c(accumulator, page_items)

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    16x
                    
                      
        next_token <- data$next_page_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    16x
                    
                      
        has_more <- !is.null(next_token) && nzchar(next_token)

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    16x
                    
                      
        if (has_more && page_count < max_pages) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
          # Throttle between pages (sync only; a blocking sleep would stall the

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
          # event loop in async mode).

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    5x
                    
                      
          if (!is_async && sleep > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    !
                    
                      
            Sys.sleep(sleep)

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    5x
                    
                      
          return(fetch_page(next_token))

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    
                    
                      
        # Stopped with the server still reporting more data: keep what we have

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    
                    
                      
        # but make the truncation impossible to miss.

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    11x
                    
                      
        if (has_more) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    2x
                    
                      
          rlang::warn(sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    2x
                    
                      
            paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    2x
                    
                      
              "alpaca_paginate: stopped at max_pages = %s with more data ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    2x
                    
                      
              "still available (fetched %d page(s)). Returning a partial ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    2x
                    
                      
              "result. Resume from a later `start`, or raise `max_pages`."

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    
                    
                      
            ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    2x
                    
                      
            format(max_pages),

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    2x
                    
                      
            page_count

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    
                    
                      
          ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    11x
                    
                      
        return(.parser(accumulator))

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    
                    
                      
      },

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    16x
                    
                      
      is_async = is_async

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    11x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_alpaca_paginate(fetch_page()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      
#' Parse and Validate an Alpaca API Response

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    
                    
                      
#' Extracts JSON from an [httr2::response], validates the HTTP status, and

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    
                    
                      
#' returns the parsed data. Alpaca returns error details in the JSON body

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
#' with a `message` field. This is the connector's `.parse_envelope()` seam.

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    
                    
                      
#' @param resp (class<httr2_response>) the response object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
#' @param simplifyVector (scalar<logical>) passed to [httr2::resp_body_json].

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `FALSE` (lists preserved). Set to `TRUE` for endpoints returning

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    
                    
                      
#'   parallel arrays (e.g., portfolio history) so JSON nulls become NA in atomic

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    
                    
                      
#'   vectors.

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (any) the parsed JSON response data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom httr2 resp_status resp_body_json resp_body_string

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rlang abort

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    
                    
                      
# nolint start: object_name_linter. `simplifyVector` mirrors httr2::resp_body_json's argument name verbatim.

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    
                    
                      
parse_alpaca_response <- function(resp, simplifyVector = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    
                    
                      
  # nolint end

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    129x
                    
                      
  assert_args_parse_alpaca_response(resp, simplifyVector)

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    129x
                    
                      
  status <- httr2::resp_status(resp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    
                    
                      
  # Handle 204 No Content (e.g., successful DELETE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    129x
                    
                      
  if (status == 204L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_parse_alpaca_response(list()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    128x
                    
                      
  parsed <- tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    128x
                    
                      
    httr2::resp_body_json(resp, simplifyVector = simplifyVector),

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    128x
                    
                      
    error = function(e) NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    128x
                    
                      
  if (status < 200L || status >= 300L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    7x
                    
                      
    body_text <- tryCatch(httr2::resp_body_string(resp), error = function(e) NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    7x
                    
                      
    msg <- "No error message provided."

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    7x
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(parsed)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    7x
                    
                      
      msg <- if (!is.null(parsed$message)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    7x
                    
                      
        parsed$message

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    7x
                    
                      
      } else if (!is.null(parsed$msg)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    !
                    
                      
        parsed$msg

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    !
                    
                      
        msg

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    !
                    
                      
    } else if (!is.null(body_text)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    !
                    
                      
      msg <- body_text

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    7x
                    
                      
    abort_alpaca_error(status = status, msg = msg, url = resp$url, body = body_text)

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    121x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_parse_alpaca_response(parsed))

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/conditions.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Alpaca's typed API-error condition. Alpaca signals failure with HTTP status

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
# codes and a JSON body carrying a `message` (or `msg`) field, so a single raiser

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
# sits at the `parse_alpaca_response()` funnel and layers Alpaca's own class

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
# family IN FRONT of connectcore's, per the recipe in `?connectcore_conditions`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
# A caller can then catch `alpaca_api_error` (any Alpaca HTTP failure),

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
# `connectcore_api_error` (any HTTP failure fleet-wide), or `connectcore_error`

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
# (any transport failure) — reading `e$status` / `e$url` / `e$body_snippet`

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
# instead of grepping the message text.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
# Backward compatibility is a hard contract: the message string is byte-identical

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
# to the bare `rlang::abort()` this replaced ("Alpaca API error <status>: <msg>"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
# so existing tests and downstream message greps keep matching. The classes and

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
# fields are purely additive.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' Raise a typed Alpaca HTTP API error

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' Signals a condition classed

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' `c("alpaca_api_error_<status>", "alpaca_api_error",`

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' `"connectcore_api_error_<status>", "connectcore_api_error",`

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' `"connectcore_error")` (on top of rlang's error classes), carrying the HTTP

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' `status`, the request `url` (query-string credentials redacted with

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' [connectcore::scrub_url()]), and the response `body_snippet` as structured

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' fields. The message defaults to the byte-identical

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' `"Alpaca API error <status>: <msg>"` string the funnel signalled before typed

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' conditions existed, so nothing that matched on message text breaks. See

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' [connectcore::connectcore_conditions] for the taxonomy and the subclass recipe.

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @param status (scalar<count in [100, 599]>) the HTTP status code. Also names

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   the most specific classes, `alpaca_api_error_<status>` and

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   `connectcore_api_error_<status>`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param msg (scalar<character>) the extracted Alpaca error message (from the

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'   body's `message` / `msg` field, or the raw body). Rendered into the

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   condition message after the status.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param url (scalar<character> | NULL) the request URL; query-string credentials

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   are redacted with [connectcore::scrub_url()] before storing on the `url`

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   field. Default `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @param body (scalar<character> | NULL) the response body text; stored on the

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   `body_snippet` field (named `body_snippet`, not `body`, because

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   `rlang::abort()` reserves `body`). Default `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' @param message (scalar<character> | NULL) the condition message. `NULL`

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'   (default) derives the byte-identical legacy string from `status` and `msg`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (class<connectcore_error>) never returns normally; signals the classed

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   condition described above.

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rlang abort caller_env

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
abort_alpaca_error <- function(status, msg, url = NULL, body = NULL, message = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    7x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(message)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    7x
                    
                      
    message <- paste0("Alpaca API error ", status, ": ", msg)

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    7x
                    
                      
  return(rlang::abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    7x
                    
                      
    message = message,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    7x
                    
                      
    class = c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    7x
                    
                      
      sprintf("alpaca_api_error_%d", as.integer(status)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    7x
                    
                      
      "alpaca_api_error",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    7x
                    
                      
      sprintf("connectcore_api_error_%d", as.integer(status)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    7x
                    
                      
      "connectcore_api_error",

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    7x
                    
                      
      "connectcore_error"

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    7x
                    
                      
    status = as.integer(status),

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    7x
                    
                      
    url = connectcore::scrub_url(url),

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    7x
                    
                      
    body_snippet = body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    7x
                    
                      
    call = rlang::caller_env()

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#' Raise a typed Alpaca input-validation error

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' Signals a condition classed `c("alpaca_validation_error", "alpaca_error")` (on

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#' top of rlang's error classes) for a NON-transport failure: a method's argument

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#' or parameter is malformed or violates a rule before any request is made

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#' (mutually-exclusive parameters supplied together, a missing required order

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' field, a `page_size` over the cap, an unknown timeframe, a malformed `legs`

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#' list). `alpaca_error` is the connector's DOMAIN root, parallel to the transport

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#' `connectcore_error` root: a validation failure is not a transport failure, so

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#' the two roots never meet -- exactly the `core_error` / `connectcore_error`

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' split. The `message` is passed through verbatim, so the string stays

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#' byte-identical to the bare `rlang::abort()` this replaced. See

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' [connectcore::connectcore_conditions] for the transport taxonomy.

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' @param message (scalar<character>) the condition message, passed through

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'   verbatim to [rlang::abort()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' @param ... structured fields stored on the condition, read with `e[["field"]]`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#'   Forwarded to [rlang::abort()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#' @param call (environment) the environment blamed in the traceback; defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'   the caller via [rlang::caller_env()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (class<alpaca_error>) never returns normally; signals the classed

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#'   condition described above.

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rlang abort caller_env

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#' @noassert

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
abort_alpaca_validation_error <- function(message, ..., call = rlang::caller_env()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    32x
                    
                      
  return(rlang::abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    32x
                    
                      
    message = message,

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    32x
                    
                      
    class = c("alpaca_validation_error", "alpaca_error"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    ...,

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    32x
                    
                      
    call = call

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/utils.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# General utility functions for the alpaca package.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Retrieve Alpaca API Base URL

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Returns the base URL for the Alpaca Trading API in the following priority:

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' 1. The explicitly provided `url` parameter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' 2. The `ALPACA_API_ENDPOINT` environment variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' 3. The default `"https://paper-api.alpaca.markets"` (paper trading).

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param url (scalar<character> | NULL) explicit base URL. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   `Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_ENDPOINT")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (scalar<character>) the API base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' get_base_url()

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' get_base_url("https://api.alpaca.markets")

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
get_base_url <- function(url = Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_ENDPOINT")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    3x
                    
                      
  assert_args_get_base_url(url)

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    3x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(url) || !nzchar(url)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_get_base_url("https://paper-api.alpaca.markets"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    2x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_get_base_url(url))

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' Retrieve Alpaca Market Data API Base URL

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' Returns the base URL for the Alpaca Market Data API in the following priority:

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' 1. The explicitly provided `url` parameter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' 2. The `ALPACA_DATA_ENDPOINT` environment variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' 3. The default `"https://data.alpaca.markets"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @param url (scalar<character> | NULL) explicit base URL. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   `Sys.getenv("ALPACA_DATA_ENDPOINT")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (scalar<character>) the Market Data API base URL.

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' get_data_base_url()

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' get_data_base_url("https://data.sandbox.alpaca.markets")

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
get_data_base_url <- function(url = Sys.getenv("ALPACA_DATA_ENDPOINT")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    3x
                    
                      
  assert_args_get_data_base_url(url)

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    3x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(url) || !nzchar(url)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    2x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_get_data_base_url("https://data.alpaca.markets"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    1x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_get_data_base_url(url))

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' Retrieve Alpaca API Credentials

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' Fetches API credentials from environment variables or explicit arguments.

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' Required environment variables: `ALPACA_API_KEY`, `ALPACA_API_SECRET`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' @param api_key (scalar<character>) Alpaca API key ID. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'   `Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_KEY")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' @param api_secret (scalar<character>) Alpaca API secret key. Defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'   `Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_SECRET")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (list) the credentials:

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' - api_key (scalar<character>) the API key ID.

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#' - api_secret (scalar<character>) the API secret key.

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' keys <- get_api_keys()

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#' keys <- get_api_keys(api_key = "my_key", api_secret = "my_secret")

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
get_api_keys <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  api_key = Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_KEY"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
  api_secret = Sys.getenv("ALPACA_API_SECRET")

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    16x
                    
                      
  assert_args_get_api_keys(api_key, api_secret)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    16x
                    
                      
  if (!nzchar(api_key) || !nzchar(api_secret)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    1x
                    
                      
    rlang::warn(paste(

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    1x
                    
                      
      "Alpaca API credentials are empty.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    1x
                    
                      
      "Set ALPACA_API_KEY and ALPACA_API_SECRET environment variables",

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    1x
                    
                      
      "or pass them explicitly."

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    16x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_get_api_keys(list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    16x
                    
                      
    api_key = api_key,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    16x
                    
                      
    api_secret = api_secret

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
  )))

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# File: R/utils_time.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# Timestamp conversion utilities for the Alpaca API.

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Convert RFC-3339 Timestamp to POSIXct

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Parses an RFC-3339 timestamp string (e.g., `"2024-01-15T14:30:00Z"`) into

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' a `POSIXct` object in UTC. Returns `NA` for `NULL` or `NA` input.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (character | logical | NA | NULL) RFC-3339 timestamp string(s), or a

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   bare `NA` (`logical`), or `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (POSIXct | NA) the parsed UTC date-times, or `NA` if input is

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   `NULL`/`NA`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' time_convert_from_alpaca("2024-01-15T14:30:00Z")

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' time_convert_from_alpaca("2024-01-15T14:30:00.123-05:00")

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom lubridate as_datetime

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
time_convert_from_alpaca <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    4x
                    
                      
  assert_args_time_convert_from_alpaca(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    4x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(x) || all(is.na(x))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    2x
                    
                      
    return(assert_return_time_convert_from_alpaca(lubridate::NA_POSIXct_))

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    2x
                    
                      
  return(assert_return_time_convert_from_alpaca(lubridate::as_datetime(x)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' Convert POSIXct to RFC-3339 Timestamp String

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' Formats a `POSIXct` object as an RFC-3339 timestamp string suitable for

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' the Alpaca API. Output is always in UTC with `Z` suffix.

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (POSIXct | character | logical | NULL) a date-time (or character

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   coercible to POSIXct), or a bare `NA` (`logical`), or `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @return (character | NA) RFC-3339 strings (e.g., `"2024-01-15T14:30:00Z"`),

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   or `NA` if input is `NULL`/`NA`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
